name: Katie Porter + moms
subject: No discount
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office
#teamkatie
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/EA/EA007/1/88265/images/IMG_2521.JPG] DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]https://www.facebook.com/momsinoffice [https://www.facebook.com/momsinoffice] https://twitter.com/momsinoffice [https://twitter.com/momsinoffice] https://instagram.com/momsinoffice [https://instagram.com/momsinoffice]

Moms in Office

body:
This Black Friday, I hear there's a really good deal on new leadership in the U.S. Senate for the people of Louisiana. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lukemixon/soundbite-8622639?e=03e0a9e31b)

| | Peter,

This Black Friday, I hear there's a really good deal on new leadership in the U.S. Senate for the people of Louisiana.

Sen. John Kennedy is overpriced and ineffective. I know that in the U.S. Senate I will be a consensus builder and bring much-needed action to the issues most impacting our state.

ACT NOW, and take advantage of the great deals on better leadership in Washington by donating [__**HERE**__](https://LukeMixon.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96d8ff1e158583235f35b1ce1&id=8ae71ce63d&e=03e0a9e31b).

Sincerely,
Luke Mixon

name: (2) me, Daria NRSC
subject: ☭ Biden ?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter, is everything ok?

Chairman Scott asked me to personally reach out to you because we haven't heard back from you...

We need 10,000 more votes if we're to hold Biden accountable for putting the Chinese ahead of Americans.

Thank you for your help,

Daria
NRSC Digital Director

On Monday November 22nd, the NRSC wrote:

Republicans are using the filibuster to DESTROY Biden’s priorities one by one:

H.R. 1? ❌ **BLOCKED**
The Equality Act? ❌ **BLOCKED**
The Freedom to Vote Act? ❌ **BLOCKED**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Where should I send this?
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfkdmk6k8ob2s8h81g399bjf2lgf84iogtcjuqbo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o72cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlisc8u496tof7ei3m75d1n9ok71t6ls89t1f0t0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o72cth2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztamj887me2btqrnjvc652uqj81ghenmr0e0prh8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o72cth2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2p5imfgjll6pcik9io1upn5kqagpgjpvfsnb1r0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o72cth2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z59jol0d4la0fl7h0ep3dp36etecuh1ijprssqi8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o72cth2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2vjpuoa939hnqlpqd3i2p7eq6daf1d71i3i81p8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o72cth2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zcf1n5cjds46hcjtpm8qslsecguhlop3838ul4b8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o75clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice—that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted—liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope—we must fight back with the truth. **Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning.** In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”** And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans—especially younger Americans—and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zelcmgvj42df9fir4mrvnld7gokstj4nf4f0d8a8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o75clh2bs)**_ [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjiqq1afgvcaqkqit3gur3202bbr9emdf74k54do_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o75clh2bs) Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** This work is the surest means of defending liberty—which is why we make every online course available **free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources—and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** —but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. **Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more?** Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zn79s9cppso63r64j9c05n1k4begh9jtqf8iv890_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o75clh2bs)**_ We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles** and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z38k5dncu172vd3gdran0208bo6g9f88pe5e1vq8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o75clh2bs)**_
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: His Henhouse ways
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
Support America, not the CCP [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8179%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=cNscAjP0G%2fSEFz5pmwkzuw&sysid=1)
Support America, not the CCP

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18394%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q8YYfQxaqhdzvYvkNiwaRw&sysid=1)
---

Folks,

Joe Biden may not be a chicken, but he has his henhouse ways.

While China continues to take a mile with every inch Joe Biden gives them, the American people are put in the back seat and forgotten about.

Joe Biden and Xi Jinping are two peas in a pod, and that frightens me.

**[Show your support for SUPPORTING America and not the CCP. > >](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18305%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=825yKecIx8yJAsdtmyqjSw&sysid=1)**

---
| [DONATE $500](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18300%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bO%2fJgiXxQB1TS0szbw69vw&sysid=1)
---

We have a President who shines the shoes of our foreign enemies while playing hooky with his Presidential responsibilities.

**[Americans across the country must remember the way we are being treated by this administration or we will see our country become China 2.0.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18301%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RgrOnMdg%2bXe%2bmpapiI3mQA&sysid=1)**

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Biggest FREEDOM PARTY of 2021!
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6qt9878m1d6p11lqjbkia6fte664q7t9n5d6l98_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uprbathjcqqj8s776gp6ec37coob6d33mhpr9cdimqpjbclgs6om8t1imjgm2c37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphgesqj0o3mc1j3coljc5jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or6c3g68o30sph649fg)
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z21akh4ifkcensphh1jkj2rfaaf7473qcrla14no_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o76c9h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn82r7kccc29800teprja4tcl4bb0jt4tlqd35co_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o76c9h2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zei06mqhfapgdp19vl06tc2kfpc7ss3iq47tcpio_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o76c9h2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z30l53se2dtpppu27fqmkd1kidv8bm52kjotvgn8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o76c9h2bs)**[?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuu51ae1raknsgq8hhkn6nbpi61ovsaslch2di3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o76c9h2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z032op42jfkefdnf5f75qsn1dhhdmon63dg1t4co_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o76c9h2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2sp25rvlucsubvk3hhssekh65vfkrca8i7mv9oo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o76c9h2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgjuge2ntfnpg351b3l2j48u88ffo72oc5e4c9p0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o76c9h2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv6nv79gf6db69066bd0ihiio4jbfs2denkqavo8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o76c9h2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpprudru0bkond2ujjg6qj5ir3kp8rdmais5fk38_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o76c9h2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqtmrr3l6od6s5auu40ltrajchelf52sqbnr1ed0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o76c9h2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsqd35nskk61bclpm6s260ao3qo9c14m19j7oue0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o76c9h2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1onr0cdd0kg8icst0qtdqcluoulvk997jf47qi8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o76c9h2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z9ocnfv74ntt45pmtvja59pbec6emo05qcj8p5eo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo3eek8k1srrqlv4njg9ktfrenoglbm5v8n8u178_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i60o76c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: I'm speaking out about George Floyd, Peter
body:
| | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | You want to know my perspective of 2020 Peter?
It was a disaster.

And unlike several other so-called conservatives that want to virtue-signal, I'm going to shoot you straight on George Floyd, the trial of Derek Chauvin, and the riots that took place.

_(I know this email is a little longer than usual, but please read through to the end)_

First and foremost, instead of looking at this from the perspective of a white cop and a black man... let’s take skin color completely out of it.

We must completely remove it from our minds.

Why?

Because it’s the only way to look at the data objectively and be impartial.

Have you done it, Peter?

Have you removed skin color from your mind?

Okay, great!

Because this is about an officer and a suspect, pure and simple.

Now...

If we objectively look at the facts, here they are:

Evidence presented by the MSM a year ago:

* A 9-minute video of what appears to be an officer’s knee (Derek Chauvin) to the back of a suspect’s neck (George Floyd).

Evidence finally made public due to Derek Chauvin's trial:

* Suspect resisted arrest.
* Suspect originally placed in the police car.
* While in the police car, the suspect said several times he couldn’t breathe and that he had covid (seven full times before he was ever on the ground).
* Officers offered to turn the AC on and even offered to roll down the windows.
* Suspect asked to be laid down on the ground.
* Suspect had 3x the lethal dose of fentanyl in his system, as well as methamphetamine.
* It was testified that the officer followed department policy while restraining the suspect.
* Original autopsy revealed no physical findings that support a diagnosis of traumatic asphyxia or strangulation. (This is most likely because the evidence (both visual and medical) showed that bruising was on the shoulder, supporting the claim that the officer’s knee wasn’t on the back of the neck, but rather, at the very top of the shoulders)

Moving forward, let’s use their names...

In the United States, our laws dictate that you are innocent until proven guilty, which means it has to be proven that Chauvin’s actions caused Floyd’s death beyond a reasonable doubt.

Well, here’s how that works:

If the jury believed Floyd __probably__ died because of Chauvin, that means they had some doubt.

**This would conclude:** Not Guilty

If the jury believed it’s __most likely__ that Floyd died because of Chauvin, that means there was still a little doubt.

**This would conclude:** Not Guilty

If the jury believed it is __impossible by every standard__ that Floyd’s health and intoxication caused his death, that means they had no reasonable doubt.

**This would conclude:** Guilty

So the jury basically stated that Floyd’s death, in no way, had anything to do with his medical condition and that overdose was impossible...

Despite:

* Floyd being hospitalized for an overdose one month prior.
* Floyd having THREE TIMES the lethal dose of drugs in his system, foaming at the mouth, and was incoherent.
* Floyd saying he couldn’t breathe before being restrained (he said it 7 full times before he was ever on the ground).
* Floyd having many pre-existing conditions, including heart disease.

Here's my question, Peter ...

Could the jury really be objective and impartial towards Derek Chauvin considering:

* The trial took place in the very city where the media had already influenced everyone to convict and try Chauvin before they had all the facts...
* The very city that has been terrorized by riots, looting, and burning down of buildings and so much destruction...
* And when people in government like Rep. Maxine Waters incited violence by saying if Chauvin is not found guilty, and I quote, "_We’ve got to stay on the street, and we’ve got to get more active. We’ve got to get more confrontational. We’ve got to make sure that they know that we mean business._ "
* Evidence came out that at least one of the jurors was possibly a member of BLM, which means it’s highly unlikely that juror could remain objective and impartial.

When we take a look at these facts, I have to ask myself, "_Could the jury really have acted objectively and impartially?_ "

As if the lies, propaganda, and false narratives perpetrated by BLM weren't bad enough, the fake news' representation of the death of George Floyd made the problem exponentially worse.

George Floyd's death resulted in misplaced outrage, riots, division, death, destruction, and the call to defund police all over the nation.

In October of 2020, The Major Cities Chiefs Association released some shocking data from protests between May 25 and July 31 in MCCA member cities.

There were:

* 574 declared riots with violence and other criminal acts.
* 2,000+ law enforcement officers injured

You can read the Fox News article [here](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20lMkZ1cyUyRnBvbGljZS1jaGllZi1vZmZpY2Vycy1pbmp1cmVkLXJpb3Rz&sig=5yxxoxeMHYES6T8F2QuCZK75g7xD8Vu4VDMX61DLVLdS&iat=1638016213&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=14A22A1A58).

And we won't even touch the scamdemic and its impact on law enforcement.

But all in all, 2020 was the deadliest year for law enforcement since 1974.

To be specific, approximately 363 law enforcement officers lost their lives.

To put that into perspective, let's look at the line of duty deaths over the past six years:

* 2020: 363 officer deaths.
* 2019: 150 officer deaths.
* 2018: 187 officer deaths.
* 2017: 186 officer deaths.
* 2016: 181 officer deaths.
* 2015: 167 officer deaths.
* 2014: 163 officer deaths.

The fact is, our heroes in blue need us NOW more than ever before. They need more funding, not less. The defunding of police only leads to fewer officers, inadequate training, and a rising crime rate.

Unfortunately, there's a sickening agenda to defund, disarm, and dismantle law enforcement all over the nation.
Aren't you sick of it, Peter?

I most certainly am, and it's time to be proactive in this fight instead of reactive.

But how can we do that?

Stay tuned for tomorrow's email.

---
| | |
---
| | For Freedom,
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | |

body:
The radical Leftist and spineless RINOs in Congress have turned their backs on the Patriots in this country.

Peter,

The America-First movement is growing rapidly. I’m glad to have you on our side.

The radical Leftist and spineless RINOs in Congress have turned their backs on the patriots in this country. They don’t share your concerns like I do.

It’s why I created this quick survey. I want to know what issues matter most to you. Click below to answer our survey.

I’m an America-First conservative who refuses to back down from a fight. That’s who I am and that’s what I’ll continue to do. Your answers will help me focus on WINNING on the issues that _you_ care about the most.

This survey will only take a minute of your time. This is your chance to share your thoughts with me and contribute to our campaign.

I look forward to seeing your answers.

Thank you,

Senator Nathan Dahm

Official Message From The Chairman Of The Republican National Committee

**FORMAL NOTICE FROM REPUBLICAN HQ:**
A FEW MORE SPOTS JUST OPENED TO BECOME A TOP TRUMP PATRIOT
* * *
Hello Peter,
President Donald J. Trump just sent out a clear directive to Conservatives everywhere: we must win back the House for the American People.
I'm taking his call to action with the utmost seriousness. I certainly hope you do too.
[**Consider this your formal notice directly from Republican Headquarters: the next American Patriots to answer his call and respond to this email will be added to the list of TOP PATRIOTS.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888280:67BtJ02NX:m:1:3298722022:6E7FB2157CF9D9E8025783D2BBB018AE:r)
**I managed to reserve a spot specifically for you. You have from RIGHT NOW until midnight to claim it. After that, we'll be forced to move on!**
This is your formal notice: I reserved your spot under the following email: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888280:67BtJ02NX:m:1:3298722022:6E7FB2157CF9D9E8025783D2BBB018AE:r) \-- please claim it before tonight.
[**But if you believe in President Trump 's vision for the future of America, now is your chance to go on the record. We'll list you as a TOP PATRIOT if you step up right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888280:67BtJ02NX:m:1:3298722022:6E7FB2157CF9D9E8025783D2BBB018AE:r)
Sincerely,
Ronna McDaniel

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: BRAND NEW EVENT: America Fest 2021
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a brand new event:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0g33ogkggi22rg5qk5gpa5vgdg84ajqipl4ngg8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i66oj4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onjedqm6cr4ekrb0sdkserb9dtmmmp79c5gcqrj8dhj6ph69cbh6prj2oj7car6fduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc3n6ko60tj6coqe9cr2cuobapbi4no)
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjoltsntnjnr0kk57m0rlbjtaq50aot7hijvb9mo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i66oj4c5h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z30rbr8ng8frcpd735m87pum0mv5f0rdjg2v13q0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i66oj4c5h2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs4tgnhv29nvp9ejnqqrn4gk6342vn3a1mp2cev8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i66oj4c5h2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrp8fdvn7c91k0l823tjmj3o1mkinqaumn1o0130_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i66oj4c5h2bs)**[?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z03i17gobfo1skd4lm3lrnmgmbk97f2bgpr709co_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i66oj4c5h2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zriicm4fl53o8b84scundt50n8bo3qp5s37omoqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i66oj4c5h2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zak36endf45i3h54d4v3elu1868dotv3mrr4u010_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i66oj4c5h2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsorls9jhu94ia0021vsrkuc8corv1uti3s6rfe8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i66oj4c5h2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeundddl61o25i0grcbtu2foe2cd6t0vvhhlfn2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i66oj4c5h2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeg95rt1genbfke3df7l8rr5aca9ap1opimkjl6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i66oj4c5h2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z77nquoc97j96ihdhljjerkc74v1sjem9hm5ohk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i66oj4c5h2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb3q1h7dq8tcb5tj1cqvu6ov9inuhaibt78e46ho_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i66oj4c5h2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1cvm9lbdmrt4j6h4adofhnv40p7a14q9a9v6n6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i66oj4c5h2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zjnu1gnpo2tdt0iaurbradc70kseaahj7df08iv8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmli4l2l010cqc4bqd59eg0sdahvivtni7lene38_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i66oj4c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

And if you’re not able to make it, AmericaFest 2021 will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to**bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war. Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens And Many More! Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson And More Musical Guests! Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need YOUR help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for AmericaFest 2021 and have promised not to disappoint! It’s going to be awesome. Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— and so much more. If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** — With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Defense News
subject: A false narrative
body:
Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zauc92ghj466lkip9pmtirdoscnug72frmure9jo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i61o30c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tr56opb1o9ksqqn2tdgc6o65dj4mlo72sbjcur77cli65jr0slgmdpb3crmeloefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30tpl61g7co36ehjj6p37m2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zetkfcr1o2ocmmoi032djgdubbu9lpnsq9ee8pc0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i61o30c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice—that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted—liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope—we must fight back with the truth. **Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning.** In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”** And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans—especially younger Americans—and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zaj4t6ksu1er40takus1nhu45ruecbfi9l66knj8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i61o30c3h2bs)**_ [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlrhj4kudqoiu5usmdd1au02f0navrl7fdnd40ho_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i61o30c3h2bs) Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** This work is the surest means of defending liberty—which is why we make every online course available **free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources—and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** —but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. **Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more?** Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0t0jbi6nu6id9mdk0s1ftsik6cm1ve930qrag98_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i61o30c3h2bs)**_ We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles** and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztf00itnlo2ddha2m6rk0nd2dm00ik6ljv1dt1vg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1i61o30c3h2bs)**_
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zgc04n76g8du0qnv1mtg3jhlbg6hqbekmhg34110).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z63kijlt72mc31280uoj13fbunem7ati9tm2rsc8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c3g68o70c1ge49fg)

According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump’s brand new social media site? name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: The first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
When I was growing up, I never could have imagined I’d become the first Latina ever elected to the Senate. It was only possible thanks to grassroots supporters like you, friend. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39043446/318167393/1314235303?refcode=e20211127_ccm-split&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDYxNmExMi04OTRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5G-JLdD8R--FKnkZ-8oGSjf9qtBxXbgFWTXv8Fuk2n4=) My parents taught me that I could accomplish _anything_ with hard work, honesty, and respect for others. I took that lesson and dedicated my life to public service. They motivated me every day, and their lessons pushed my sister and me to be the first in our family to graduate college. Then I got to work defending my community. I served two terms as Nevada’s Attorney General, and then I became the first Latina and first woman from Nevada _ever_ elected to the U.S. Senate. I won by just two points, narrowly overcoming $50 million spent by Mitch McConnell and his allies to defeat me. Now new polling shows me 2 points _behind_ my Trump-endorsed opponent, and CNN is calling me one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country. My race has officially been downgraded from ‘Leans Democratic’ to ‘Toss-Up,’ and I’m about to fall short of my critical midnight goal. **[Please team, will you rush a $5 donation right now to split between my campaign and Maggie Hassan's to help me defeat Donald Trump’s endorsed candidate and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39043448/318167396/1314235303?refcode=e20211127_ccm-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDYxNmExMi04OTRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5G-JLdD8R--FKnkZ-8oGSjf9qtBxXbgFWTXv8Fuk2n4=)** Mitch McConnell is only one seat away from retaking control of the Senate, which means we have zero room for error. I’m counting on your _immediate_ support to close the polling gap by hitting this critical goal before my midnight deadline. _¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues! Catherine
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: American Update
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog” captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8188%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=IXrlcNGTcZgqTKpF6zqvPA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18310%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eVtIkjXmWhMzzcrOQYLBrA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18311%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uwfCWCHRUzjKsYREBrbTqA&sysid=1)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18310%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eVtIkjXmWhMzzcrOQYLBrA&sysid=1) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18312%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m3QxGHaXGPjzdxTI9ZLDfg&sysid=1)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8188%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=IXrlcNGTcZgqTKpF6zqvPA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8188%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=IXrlcNGTcZgqTKpF6zqvPA&sysid=1)

subject: Support a small business today!

Wade Herring, lawyer and community volunteer, is running for Congress in Georgia’s First Congressional District. Wade grew up in Macon, Georgia. He has worked with the law firm of HunterMaclean since 1985. Among other volunteer positions, Wade has served as president of the Savannah Bar Association, chair of the trustees at Wesley Monumental United Methodist Church, and board member of Georgia Appleseed. Wade is a graduate of Dartmouth College and the University of Georgia School of Law.Wade lives in Savannah, Georgia with his wife Susan of 39 years. Wade and Susan are the parents of two children, a son who is a lawyer in Atlanta, and a daughter who is a doctor in Winston-Salem, North Carolina.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: $1,000,000 to stop Twitter Censorship!
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888377:6KCQz02tN:m:1:3298722022:29E4140D5CD73DF4822053E7BFCC8440:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888377:6KCQz02tN:m:1:3298722022:29E4140D5CD73DF4822053E7BFCC8440:r)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888377:6KCQz02tN:m:1:3298722022:29E4140D5CD73DF4822053E7BFCC8440:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888377:6KCQz02tN:m:1:3298722022:29E4140D5CD73DF4822053E7BFCC8440:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888377:6KCQz02tN:m:1:3298722022:29E4140D5CD73DF4822053E7BFCC8440:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. _ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888377:6KCQz02tN:m:1:3298722022:29E4140D5CD73DF4822053E7BFCC8440:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888377:6KCQz02tN:m:1:3298722022:29E4140D5CD73DF4822053E7BFCC8440:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888377:6KCQz02tN:m:1:3298722022:29E4140D5CD73DF4822053E7BFCC8440:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we 're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. ** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888377:6KCQz02tN:m:1:3298722022:29E4140D5CD73DF4822053E7BFCC8440:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888377:6KCQz02tN:m:1:3298722022:29E4140D5CD73DF4822053E7BFCC8440:r) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888377:6KCQz02tN:m:1:3298722022:29E4140D5CD73DF4822053E7BFCC8440:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888377:6KCQz02tN:m:1:3298722022:29E4140D5CD73DF4822053E7BFCC8440:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888377:6KCQz02tN:m:1:3298722022:29E4140D5CD73DF4822053E7BFCC8440:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888377:6KCQz02tN:m:1:3298722022:29E4140D5CD73DF4822053E7BFCC8440:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58888378:6KCQz02tN:m:1:3298722022:29E4140D5CD73DF4822053E7BFCC8440:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

body:
ICYMI - Morning And These Dems Hyped the Debunked Steele Dossier, Now

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Keeping the House blue takes all of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/mskgcGG1D1gwc4X5FeO_q6743u_OUu5Y5YyL2YnilH8=/HZDnKVetbY7AJpSivR4iasoTi5rBEziKIylTq3mcw3I=?refcode=blu-span-20211127-1-em&amount=25)
---
Peter,

It's Adam Schiff. I value your time so I'll cut right to the chase:

The stakes of this midterm election couldn't be higher, and re-electing my colleague Abigail Spanberger to Congress is crucial to keeping our Democratic majority.

Abigail works hard for policies that will improve life for Virginians - whether by expanding rural broadband, securing funding to fix Virginia's roads and highways, or working to lower prescription drug costs, just to name a few of her efforts. We need hard workers like her in Congress who deliver results for people.

But her district is one of the most competitive in the nation and has been targeted by National Republican and outside spending groups who want to flip her seat Red. And they are willing to spend millions to defeat her. We can't let that happen.

[_**We need to re-elect Abigail to Congress in 2022, and your contributions strengthen her campaign immensely. If you 're able, contribute to her re-election campaign today so she can continue working hard for Central Virginia and hold our Democratic majority.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/mskgcGG1D1gwc4X5FeO_q6743u_OUu5Y5YyL2YnilH8=/HZDnKVetbY7AJpSivR4iasoTi5rBEziKIylTq3mcw3I=?refcode=blu-span-20211127-1-em&amount=25)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/mskgcGG1D1gwc4X5FeO_q6743u_OUu5Y5YyL2YnilH8=/HZDnKVetbY7AJpSivR4iasoTi5rBEziKIylTq3mcw3I=?refcode=blu-span-20211127-1-em&amount=25)
---
Abigail has shown throughout her career - from federal law enforcement, to the CIA, to the House of Representatives - that she's devoted to service. I've seen firsthand just how much she stands up for Central Virginia, and I know if she's re-elected she'll continue doing just that. **With your support, we can ensure she continues serving Central Virginia and that we keep the House blue in 2022.**

Leaders like Abigail are exactly the type of people we need in Congress. People who stand firmly for what they believe in, who are there to do right by others, and who know that good policy is good politics. That's Abigail.

[_**So, if you can, join me in supporting her re-election efforts by making a contribution today.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/mskgcGG1D1gwc4X5FeO_q6743u_OUu5Y5YyL2YnilH8=/HZDnKVetbY7AJpSivR4iasoTi5rBEziKIylTq3mcw3I=?refcode=blu-span-20211127-1-em&amount=25)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/mskgcGG1D1gwc4X5FeO_q6743u_OUu5Y5YyL2YnilH8=/HZDnKVetbY7AJpSivR4iasoTi5rBEziKIylTq3mcw3I=?refcode=blu-span-20211127-1-em&amount=25)
---
Thank you,

Congressman Adam Schiff

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Trump hasn’t gone anywhere...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39048431/318188792/1888486807?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211117eom2_GV_full_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGQ3ZWFhNS05MjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oaGeLo259GIfSJuFJNGPgOuRaEOVKtpCZNG6GOlx-78=)
---
Team, Donald Trump may have lost the 2020 presidential election, but he hasn’t left politics... Just look at these recent headlines: **“Trump's 2020 fantasy is already influencing 2022” — CNN** **“Trump to be 'very involved' in 2022 Midterms, says he 'will stay busy for good people” — Fox News** **“Trump's stolen election lie is on the ballot in 2022, thanks to these candidates” — NBC News** We may have booted Trump from the White House last year, but he and his far-right agenda haven’t gone anywhere. And here in New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District, Republican Yvette Herrell has been actively keeping his extreme priorities alive, pushing COVID-19 conspiracy theories, voting to decertify the 2020 election results, and voting against working families. Herrell and Trump do not represent me or the vast majority of New Mexicans. But we can stop Trumpism and replace Herrell less than one year from now in the midterm elections, if we can keep our momentum up. [**This Tuesday is our November end-of-month deadline. Can I count on you to chip in $10 or whatever you can afford to help us hit our goal and defeat Herrell in 2022?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39048432/318188793/1888486807?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211117eom2_GV_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGQ3ZWFhNS05MjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oaGeLo259GIfSJuFJNGPgOuRaEOVKtpCZNG6GOlx-78=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Team Beshear
subject: Small businesses are the backbone of Kentucky
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Peter --
Small businesses are the backbone of our Commonwealth, and these last two years have been particularly challenging for them. As we continue to face the COVID-19 pandemic, our local businesses need our support more than ever.

Today is Small Business Saturday -- a time to support the local businesses in your community. Whether you visit in-person, choose curbside pick-up, or place an order online, we urge you to shop local today and give back to the small businesses that have kept Kentucky’s economy running during this challenging time.

As Governor, Andy stands up for small businesses. Earlier this year, he introduced a bill that would provide much-needed relief to small businesses across Kentucky and created a tax-credit program to encourage small businesses to hire new employees.

Today, we hope you join Andy in supporting some of the amazing small businesses across the Commonwealth by shopping locally!

Team Beshear

PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
Andy Beshear for Governor
PO Box 4278
Louisville, KY 40204
United States
If you no longer wish to receive emails from us, you can unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b7c2ad8c-794c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/1dd81dad-924f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGQ4MWRhZC05MjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-B6wcHaXpWVcV1_E81h5FykjnT--kQiXAIBrOs-2CNI=&id=102280162 .

name: David and Ian, Never Again PAC
subject: We need to defeat Paul Gosar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
We hope you and your loved ones enjoyed a safe and happy Thanksgiving. With the holiday behind us, we're now focused on our crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline on Tuesday at midnight. We're reaching out today because we wanted to share a little bit about what's been happening in Congress and why it's crucial we hit our goal. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39048677/318190437/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkODUxOGIzLTkyNGYtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jOpqGx7Vox8KTq4mCDwwqh5ceG3bVqEqzZZdEOx8WTE=&emci=56b5098c-a84c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4d8518b3-924f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16335001) Team,

We hope you and your loved ones enjoyed a safe and happy Thanksgiving.

With the holiday behind us, we're now focused on our crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline on Tuesday at midnight. We're reaching out today because we wanted to share a little bit about what's been happening in Congress and why it's crucial we hit our goal.

Last week, the House voted to censure Representative Paul Gosar after he tweeted a video depicting violence against Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and President Joe Biden. As a result, Gosar has been removed from all committee assignments.

We're grateful that the House took this important step in holding Paul Gosar accountable, but it's not enough. The video Gosar tweeted is just the latest example of just how radical and dangerous he truly is.

We recently learned that Gosar met with planners of the January 6 insurrection and offered them blanket pardons to encourage them to plan the protests. Even with Gosar removed from committee assignments, he still holds an enormous amount of power and influence as a member of Congress.

Each day that Paul Gosar is in office, he remains a danger to our democracy. That's why it's not enough that we censure Gosar and remove him from committees, we must defeat him at the ballot box, too.

We're focused on defeating Paul Gosar and replacing him with a leader who will defend our democracy, but it won't be easy and we need your support.

**[Will you chip in $5 or more before our end-of-month fundraising deadline to help us defeat the dangerous and radical Paul Gosar?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39048678/318190451/-491445879?refcode=em21_211127_eom1_fnd_gq_act___di_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211127_eom1_fnd_gq_act___di_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkODUxOGIzLTkyNGYtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jOpqGx7Vox8KTq4mCDwwqh5ceG3bVqEqzZZdEOx8WTE=)**

Thank you,

David and Ian
Co-founders
Never Again PAC
Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from the 147 Republican members of Congress who sought to overturn the results of a free and fair election. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39048679/318190457/-491445879?refcode=em21_211127_eom1_fnd_gq_act___di_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211127_eom1_fnd_gq_act___di_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkODUxOGIzLTkyNGYtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jOpqGx7Vox8KTq4mCDwwqh5ceG3bVqEqzZZdEOx8WTE=)

Happy Small Business Saturday, Peter!

The holiday season is here, and with many people starting to shop, it's important to remember the small businesses that make Rhode Island special.

Small businesses are the heart of Rhode Island's economy, but many have struggled throughout the COVID-19 pandemic.

As Treasurer, I've always fought to support small businesses in every way I can. I'm particularly proud of my BankLOCAL initiative that's provided more than $47 million in loans to local small businesses. If I'm elected governor, I will continue to support small businesses and improve our local economy.

We can all make a difference by supporting the small businesses that make Rhode Island great by shopping locally this holiday season. Today I encourage you to join me in supporting our small businesses by shopping locally if you are able to do so.

clean_body: Happy Small Business Saturday, Peter! The holiday season is here, and with many people starting to shop, it's important to remember the small businesses that make Rhode Island special. Small businesses are the heart of Rhode Island's economy, but many have struggled throughout the COVID-19 pandemic. As Treasurer, I've always fought to support small businesses in every way I can. I'm particularly proud of my BankLOCAL initiative that's provided more than $47 million in loans to local small businesses. If I'm elected governor, I will continue to support small businesses and improve our local economy. We can all make a difference by supporting the small businesses that make Rhode Island great by shopping locally this holiday season. Today I encourage you to join me in supporting our small businesses by shopping locally if you are able to do so. Thank you, Seth = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY SETH MAGAZINER FOR GOVERNOR VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Seth Magaziner for Governor Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 303 Providence, RI 02901 United States

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: I need your feedback
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend,

If this month's loss in the Virginia Governor's race – and our surprisingly narrow victory in New Jersey – taught us anything, it's that Democrats cannot take a single seat for granted next year. We cannot come up short on our fundraising, our campaign strategy, our voter turnout – on any of it. Not with Democratic Senate control hanging on by a thread. Not with so much progress left to make for the American people.

But even as Senate Democrats have partnered with President Biden to pass monumental legislation, political forecasters just downgraded several key Senate races from "Leans Democrat" to "Toss Up" status. If we come up short in just a single race, Mitch McConnell will once again call the shots in the Senate. All hope for progress will be lost.

Ahead of the upcoming election year, I need my most engaged grassroots supporters to weigh in on Democratic campaign strategy. Taking back Senate control last year was a grassroots effort, and defending it this time around will take an even bigger grassroots effort. That's why I take your feedback so seriously, and why my team created a brand-new Democratic Focus Group to collect your input. I'm looking for 500 members of this team to participate in this new digital focus group before my next strategy meeting tomorrow morning. Can I count on your feedback to help me protect Democratic Senate control?

[BEGIN FOCUS GROUP >>>]-https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-1121-priorities?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1105-su-nd

As we inch ever-closer to the start of 2022, my team and I will be making crucial decisions about how to compete in this must-win Senate race and protect Democratic Senate control. Your input is very important to this decision-making process, so I appreciate you taking the time to do this focus group.

Respectfully,

Dick

Contribute - https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1105-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500

--

Our appetites are sated, our hearts are full, and our fridges are fully stocked with several days worth of leftovers — but we’ve still got a mission to accomplish, and we’re gearing up for the _final week of our 95 County Tour!_

Because if we’re going to make Tennessee a place where everyone thrives — no matter where you’re from, what you look like, or how you were raised — our leaders have got to start listening to people again. **This tour will set the tone for the rest of our campaign.**

body:
We don’t have much time left, and we need you.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39054035/318201858/-135374765?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.27_b1_toh_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDI5N2NhOS05OTRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ekpqZqUs_tBoqRNSGFwsXc37P0EnijxqAREbiR09vZw=)** Hey team, We are entering into our end-of-month fundraising period, and this time the stakes are higher than ever. We only have _eleven more months until the election_ , so we need to use our time well. [**We are setting a goal of raising $4,000 from grassroots donors by the end of the month so that we can stay on track to hit our fundraising targets. Chip in right now to help us get to this goal!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39054036/318201859/-135374765?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.27_b1_toh_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDI5N2NhOS05OTRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ekpqZqUs_tBoqRNSGFwsXc37P0EnijxqAREbiR09vZw=) | ********[Donate to our End-Of-Month Goal!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39054037/318201860/-135374765?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.27_b1_toh_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDI5N2NhOS05OTRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ekpqZqUs_tBoqRNSGFwsXc37P0EnijxqAREbiR09vZw=)********
---
Fundraising typically decreases throughout the holiday season, but we can’t afford to slow down. Hitting our end-of-month goal is necessary to continue building a campaign we know can win next year. Here’s some of what grassroots donations help us do at O’Halleran HQ:
* Share our message with voters and let them know how Tom is working for them in Congress.
* Challenge misinformation from our radical opponents and outside Dark Money interest groups.

Friends — In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to contribute to my re-election campaign before midnight tonight. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Here’s the truth: We’re less than one year out from Election day. And our November deadline is nearly here. But this goal is important for a few more reasons. First, a National Republican Super PAC is running ads to defeat me in this race, and we need the resources to withstand the attack. Now, the reason we’re facing so many attacks is because CNN ranks this seat as one of the most likely to flip in 2022. And our official race ranking just changed from Lean Democratic to Pure Toss Up. But our secret weapon against the corporate special interests is you. Because if we have the resources we need, we’re going to win. It would be the honor of a lifetime to serve Arizona for a full term, but I can’t do that alone. So here’s where I ask: [**Can you please split a contribution to Seth Moulton and our campaign before the November fundraising deadline comes to an end? name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Black Friday was yesterday, but today is Small Business Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Today is Small Business Saturday, and I know I'll be spending the day visiting some of my favorite local businesses.

From King's Books in Tacoma to the Christmas Shop in Gig Harbor, from Swain's in Port Angeles to the Quimper Mercantile in Port Townsend, from Amy's Decadent Chocolates in Bremerton to Bon Bon Candies on Bainbridge (are you sensing a theme), my favorite places to buy Christmas gifts are _local_ businesses. I'm sure there are fantastic small businesses in your hometown where you can buy gifts for the holidays or grab a meal with loved ones, and today's the perfect day to do it!

As someone who spent nearly a decade in economic development, it's a huge priority of mine to create more economic opportunity for folks in our region, and that includes supporting our local employers, workers, and their families.

Main Street really needs our support now, Peter. COVID-19 closed down countless local businesses, and many of the places that remain open are still struggling to bounce back financially. Your decision to shop local today could make a **huge difference**.

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/6Sng4q6e9zZT-SyW2RTXOAMva-uRReOPg9-FwcJYWRc=/cvaKVSFNdoiVBGs_JqKJPlWkM-M8DHBxQuN_8KIHqP0=?ms=em21_211127_sbs_engg_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em21_211127_sbs_engg_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em21_211127_sbs_engg_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211127_sbs_engg_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

name: Scott (Kirsten's husband)
subject: Shh… it’s a surprise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39055641/318205542/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGI4ODkxMi05YjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LIl96N-Aa_Mgs48tsN2qrOwFWXnRrYUevfIqb9XkFFI=&emci=0e298484-7c4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f0b88912-9b4f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
I’ve taken over the campaign email today because I’m on a secret mission. Tomorrow is Kirsten’s birthday and I have something special in mind.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39055643/318205546/41694283?refcode=X_112721_EOM_A&amount=60&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGI4ODkxMi05YjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LIl96N-Aa_Mgs48tsN2qrOwFWXnRrYUevfIqb9XkFFI=)
---
After nearly 25 years of marriage I know my wife pretty well. She doesn’t want jewelry, or an expensive dinner, or even flowers. What she wants is a few hours to go hiking tomorrow. What stands in the way of that gift is the need to do “call time”.
Don’t get me wrong, Kirsten loves talking to people about the campaign, and more importantly, what she wants to accomplish once she’s elected. But it’s a long, grueling process and sometimes, you just need a break. Which is where YOU come in. The campaign team tells me that we have**an end of month goal of $10,000** so I’m hoping we can raise a good portion of that with this email, and give Kirsten tomorrow off to go hiking, read a book, or just catch up on grading papers.
[**This is a milestone birthday for Kirsten. In honor of that, can you help her (and all of us!) celebrate with a $60 contribution?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39055644/318205549/41694283?refcode=X_112721_EOM_A&amount=60&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGI4ODkxMi05YjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LIl96N-Aa_Mgs48tsN2qrOwFWXnRrYUevfIqb9XkFFI=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39055646/318205551/41694283?express_lane=true&amount=60&refcode=X_112721_EOM_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGI4ODkxMi05YjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LIl96N-Aa_Mgs48tsN2qrOwFWXnRrYUevfIqb9XkFFI=)
---
With your help, I know we can give Kirsten this unexpected, but greatly appreciated, birthday surprise.
Thank you,
Scott
