name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
People keep asking what my plans are for the next election. Well, I've made a decision.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2y3ix--fgxr-4qqlpo6&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2y3ix-1mnva-4qqlpo5/)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I’m 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That’s why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2y3ix-1mnvb-4qqlpo6/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2y3ix-1mnvc-4qqlpo7/)
---

My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2y3ix-1mnvd-4qqlpo8/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2y3ix-1mnve-4qqlpo9/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2y3ix-1mnvf-4qqlpo0/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Our democracy depends on it:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, I know it's the middle of a long weekend so I'll keep this short. A week ago the House passed a massive bill to cut costs and invest in families. Universal pre-K. Paid family leave. Childcare. Medicare and Medicaid expansion. Funding to curb child poverty. Help for renters and homebuyers. We promised voters we’d act, and the House did. The Senate must act. Now. But if we're going to pass voting rights, implement democracy reform, raise the minimum wage, and continue ensuring working families actually can get ahead – to thrive once again — we can't afford to lose our Democratic majorities. We just can’t. But with only a 5-seat advantage in the House and the Senate split 50-50, we're facing strong headwinds ahead of the midterms. And midterms are seldom favorable to the president's party. Meanwhile, Republicans have predictably turned to a campaign of voter disenfranchisement and their disinformation media complex is firing on all cylinders – we have limited time to respond. That’s why donating to support my re-election campaign as we build a support network for dozens of Democratic House candidates across the country is incredibly meaningful. The table is set for 2022. The stakes couldn’t be higher. **Derek, I'm hoping you can chip in $10, or any amount that seems right to you today. Your donation goes directly to my campaign and can make a real difference in building and keeping our House majority.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39055761/318205659/-751938712?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211127_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTlkNjZjZS05YTRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t0U2E3t71nOWYkL2w3t-m0dOeCXnlGTchGV0sCbQp7A=)

name: GOP Presidential
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc4k6d3nf6otm6qffm62shf95ffd0soih5mlih60_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1h61o76clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6sad63eislraa3p242hcgh0sa8estq2uco9kr3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1h61o76clh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0esemol125p5qn4nms4bgvo50d2h1nn6hicgfn8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1h61o76clh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: I need to hear from you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I still need another 108 responses re: protecting the USPS.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057238/318209621/701799000?code=jtk414-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzdjMjE3NC05YzRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Oeub_7wcyDSE7GGTPaP2vcX6ehgclsReKekgAU4Zks=&emci=865ea6ff-c24b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f77c2174-9c4f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13784334)
Peter – During his time in office,**Donald Trump absolutely decimated one of our nation's most cherished institutions: the U.S. Postal Service.**
And now, Trump's handpicked Postmaster General Louis DeJoy has _continued_ to wreak havoc by slashing services and intentionally increasing delivery times.
Trump has done so much damage to our country – but this hits me particularly hard. You see, these delays and budget cuts really hurt people in rural areas like Iowa, where so many of us are counting on the USPS.
Moreover, postal workers are a critical part of our communities here. I can remember seeing my mailman – Tony – covering his route in the days following the terrible derecho last year. **Amidst downed trees and power lines, he told me about how a woman on his route broke down when he delivered her insulin. She didn't have a generator or any way to keep it cold – so Tony went home and brought her his.**
You see, the USPS is a lifeline for those of us living in rural America: for services, for medications and to stay connected.
I know that you'll stand with me and our rural communities to protect the USPS. **So I'm asking you to complete my survey and help me put grassroots pressure on Congress to take action and save this critical public institution. I still need another 108 responses before midnight, so please let me know:**
**Should Congress protect the USPS?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057239/318209622/701799000?code=jtk414-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzdjMjE3NC05YzRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Oeub_7wcyDSE7GGTPaP2vcX6ehgclsReKekgAU4Zks=&emci=865ea6ff-c24b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f77c2174-9c4f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13784334)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057240/318209623/701799000?code=jtk414-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzdjMjE3NC05YzRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Oeub_7wcyDSE7GGTPaP2vcX6ehgclsReKekgAU4Zks=&emci=865ea6ff-c24b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f77c2174-9c4f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13784334)
---
Thanks for speaking out.

Abby

No End in Sight on Higher Fuel Prices

The fuel prices continue to rise, and we're all facing larger bills to heat our homes this winter. Yet, we keep hearing that the Biden Administration is aware and willing to help. Still, Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm can't name a single thing Biden has done to lower fuel prices. Instead, they continue to ban oil and gas leasing on federal lands and talk of shutting down another pipeline.

At [CaucusRoom.com](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgcd7c91mlhr8vt52ehjl8glt0iu2jrhu2j5k7g8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1h61p75cjh2bs), members are free to discuss ideas, hold honest conversations and form their opinions without being overwhelmed or suppressed by the liberal bias inherent in Twitter, Facebook, and other platforms.

Parents, neighbors, friends, colleagues, and conservatives around the country use [CaucusRoom.com](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuulun2312vr49ko3j1ork5ntd555ilort5kk180_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1h61p75cjh2bs) every day to cut through the noise and vitriol of the left and establish an authentic online community. At [CaucusRoom](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9pfdqvktdsb0pdtcsskt62i43m0o2juq0jaaf4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1h61p75cjh2bs), we seek to unite and connect you with like-minded people next door and across the country.

---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z435eusj1r4vf772ag6pfcjcuno6obruol43gqo8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1h61p73c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z97b8fbq3nfgj88v0rqocs4j2t28u0q8qrbebrf8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1h61p73c9h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zallc51rmb65lg0a3coeauj92cj3sgck5cgt45f8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1h61p73c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

we're not waiting for anyone's permission to engage in a conversation about a better future for all of us. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057958/318213411/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWYyNjhlOC05ZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBKtCwCbzAUy-Kbu4LaA2QtAazeRhAE54Ta25lYfJ9A=)
Friend,

I hope you had a nice Thanksgiving with family and friends. There was a lot to be thankful for this month: The striking workers at John Deere won a contract that may not be perfect, but boosts wages and improves working conditions. Not to mention, Democrats passed a historic infrastructure bill that secures more than $5 billion for Iowa's roads, bridges, broadband access, and more.

As always, we made it a point to visit as many different local party meetings and communities across the state as possible. I'm proud of how we're running this campaign -- we're not waiting for anyone's permission to engage in a conversation about a better future for all of us.

As we count down until the end of the year, we're confronting a major fundraising deadline. In January, the amount we raised this year will become public. Even though it might feel arbitrary, the amount we raise is an important metric that political pundits and the press will use to assess our campaign.

[**I appreciate all you've done, but with this important deadline looming, I need to ask you once again to help us meet the mark. Please take a look at the pictures below, then consider chipping in $3 to help me meet my November end-of-month goal that hits Tuesday night.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057959/318213415/-73891749?refcode=em-112721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWYyNjhlOC05ZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBKtCwCbzAUy-Kbu4LaA2QtAazeRhAE54Ta25lYfJ9A=)

More soon,

Ras Smith
Democrat for Governor

| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057966/318213422/-73891749?refcode=em-112721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWYyNjhlOC05ZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBKtCwCbzAUy-Kbu4LaA2QtAazeRhAE54Ta25lYfJ9A=)**
---

**Thanks to the West Des Moines Democrats for welcoming me. We had a great conversation about the future of our state.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057970/318213435/-73891749?refcode=em-112721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWYyNjhlOC05ZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBKtCwCbzAUy-Kbu4LaA2QtAazeRhAE54Ta25lYfJ9A=)
**Enjoyed visiting with the leaders of Iowa Safe Schools. So grateful for their support for students across our state.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057971/318213444/-73891749?refcode=em-112721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWYyNjhlOC05ZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBKtCwCbzAUy-Kbu4LaA2QtAazeRhAE54Ta25lYfJ9A=)
**Ran into my good friend Julie Stauch at the Izaak Walton League banquet. Even came away with a starter pack for a backyard prairie (_might have to wait until after the campaign)!_**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057972/318213452/-73891749?refcode=em-112721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWYyNjhlOC05ZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBKtCwCbzAUy-Kbu4LaA2QtAazeRhAE54Ta25lYfJ9A=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057973/318213456/-73891749?refcode=em-112721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWYyNjhlOC05ZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBKtCwCbzAUy-Kbu4LaA2QtAazeRhAE54Ta25lYfJ9A=)
**I stopped in Waverly for a visit with the Bremer County Democrats. It was great seeing so many friends and discussing our shared vision for Iowa. Special shout-out to the Wartburg College Democrats -- they're our future!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057975/318213457/-73891749?refcode=em-112721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWYyNjhlOC05ZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBKtCwCbzAUy-Kbu4LaA2QtAazeRhAE54Ta25lYfJ9A=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057976/318213462/-73891749?refcode=em-112721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWYyNjhlOC05ZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBKtCwCbzAUy-Kbu4LaA2QtAazeRhAE54Ta25lYfJ9A=)
**A morning meeting isn't complete without a good cup of coffee. I had a great time stopping at Slow Down Coffee Co. in Highland Park. They celebrated their first anniversary -- withstanding the pandemic due to community support.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057977/318213469/-73891749?refcode=em-112721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWYyNjhlOC05ZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBKtCwCbzAUy-Kbu4LaA2QtAazeRhAE54Ta25lYfJ9A=)
**I had the pleasure of being a guest on the first-ever live audience podcast of _Three Rural White Guys_ in Mount Pleasant in the basement of the beautiful Theatre Museum. Made some history amongst history.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057978/318213476/-73891749?refcode=em-112721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWYyNjhlOC05ZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBKtCwCbzAUy-Kbu4LaA2QtAazeRhAE54Ta25lYfJ9A=)
**Our church held a pastor appreciation service for my faith leader, and mother Belinda Creighton-Smith. I appreciate her courage, leadership, and selflessness. Mom, you're the best!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057979/318213484/-73891749?refcode=em-112721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWYyNjhlOC05ZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBKtCwCbzAUy-Kbu4LaA2QtAazeRhAE54Ta25lYfJ9A=)
**When your family is as large as mine you’ve got to get creative so there aren’t any duplicate dishes at Thanksgiving. This year I tried my hand at honey chili glazed ham, pheasant sausage stuffing, Madagascan inspired ginger and garlic quail pate, cranberry sauce with orange and mint. Plus a few peach cobblers!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057980/318213490/-73891749?refcode=em-112721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWYyNjhlOC05ZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBKtCwCbzAUy-Kbu4LaA2QtAazeRhAE54Ta25lYfJ9A=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057981/318213491/-73891749?refcode=em-112721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWYyNjhlOC05ZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBKtCwCbzAUy-Kbu4LaA2QtAazeRhAE54Ta25lYfJ9A=)
**In addition to spending a good deal of time on the picket line with the workers at John Deere, I squeezed in a few game nights with the kids. Unfortunately, I wasn't able to make it out hunting this season -- I think my dog was trying to tell me something.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057982/318213492/-73891749?refcode=em-112721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWYyNjhlOC05ZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBKtCwCbzAUy-Kbu4LaA2QtAazeRhAE54Ta25lYfJ9A=)
Thanks for reading to the end.

As you can see, we're not wasting one moment on this campaign in our pursuit of a better future for all Iowans. If you're feeling motivated and want to join, the best way to help right now is with a grassroots donation of any size.

[**Please consider chipping in here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39057983/318213493/-73891749?refcode=em-112721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWYyNjhlOC05ZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBKtCwCbzAUy-Kbu4LaA2QtAazeRhAE54Ta25lYfJ9A=) If you're unable, you can always forward this note to friends and family. It's greatly appreciated.

_\- Ras_

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY.
body:
Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvnn1i6imvlmfqn69sdunfmpgv3o87hmvs8uek6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1j60or4clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tr46ip74o3mmeqe8dbgs1hn6djnmdprcsrm6loe1d5km5p6fc9mm6pmatplmhgefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30tpl61g75c3664qb6p1nm2qmash5u)
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4lrjssc86jr5nt34kvhh2ik9gr8mjvm3rs02218_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1j60or4clh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life – **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsj1hij66doehqatkoo9aqb8hvfp29hfmenoecd8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1j60or4clh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn4a3r1p4pmpr2t2t5e52r6ln1rk7099a9ip07qg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1j60or4clh2bs)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|

clean_body: Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE! | | | | | Friend, Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE! This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense. We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful. We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start. We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out. And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision. Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life – however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills. | | Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free. You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you. With love, Wendy Rittenhouse | | | | Copyright © 2021 Free Kyle USA, All rights reserved. name: Team Gaetz
subject: We need investigative power over Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TFjQNyPAEelFbgt42AOxBypd88rKKfGr99ciEiUDiuKXfPZZ4G-rXvoKjdjmN8-jCTMyjmaiRtE-1_NK119RFhoCaC0GK1St6OGQkCFaoRfDO8fKO8yGMaeKg3seR2ThtP0rs0o77ak6KVJF9u82YMvigiWVYuCggWxV-6bA9RdJi_y7xY-KLSeEWsFhLs7a&c=qhKCC-yg1BNhk-bTEqjQ-sIAeDxs2fs6zAns6UnC0zjY67k_rFhLOA==&ch=KXzBgevv_MxVU2P4eY5ykpqiMuH3snoq68pFNCo8yBV137C3lej0wA==)
---
| Peter,
---
| Republicans are in the minority, which doesn't give our party many opportunities to go on offense against Joe Biden and his incompetent administration.
But if we take back 5 seats in the House, the GOP will own the majority and have important investigative powers over the Biden Administration.
That's why the 2022 election is so critical. If we're going to hold Dr. Fauci, Alejandro Mayorkas, Merrick Garland, and others who have LIED to Congress accountable, WE NEED TO WIN BACK THE HOUSE!
[>> HELP REPUBLICANS WIN THE HOUSE IN 2022 <<](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TFjQNyPAEelFbgt42AOxBypd88rKKfGr99ciEiUDiuKXfPZZ4G-rXvoKjdjmN8-jCTMyjmaiRtE-1_NK119RFhoCaC0GK1St6OGQkCFaoRfDO8fKO8yGMaeKg3seR2ThtP0rs0o77ak6KVJF9u82YMvigiWVYuCggWxV-6bA9RdJi_y7xY-KLSeEWsFhLs7a&c=qhKCC-yg1BNhk-bTEqjQ-sIAeDxs2fs6zAns6UnC0zjY67k_rFhLOA==&ch=KXzBgevv_MxVU2P4eY5ykpqiMuH3snoq68pFNCo8yBV137C3lej0wA==)
The American people deserve to know the truth about the origins of Covid-19, and whether US taxpayer dollars were used to fund dangerous research in the Wuhan lab. They deserve to know the truth about how many illegal immigrants are crossing our border. Parents across the country need to know that they can get involved at a school board meeting without being labeled a domestic terrorist.
These are just some of the things we'll be able to expose once Republicans are in the majority, but first, we have to win in 2022.
I'm asking, Peter, [can you chip in a donation of $5, $25, or even $50 to support America First Republicans who are aiming to take back the House?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TFjQNyPAEelFbgt42AOxBypd88rKKfGr99ciEiUDiuKXfPZZ4G-rXvoKjdjmN8-jCTMyjmaiRtE-1_NK119RFhoCaC0GK1St6OGQkCFaoRfDO8fKO8yGMaeKg3seR2ThtP0rs0o77ak6KVJF9u82YMvigiWVYuCggWxV-6bA9RdJi_y7xY-KLSeEWsFhLs7a&c=qhKCC-yg1BNhk-bTEqjQ-sIAeDxs2fs6zAns6UnC0zjY67k_rFhLOA==&ch=KXzBgevv_MxVU2P4eY5ykpqiMuH3snoq68pFNCo8yBV137C3lej0wA==)
[>> DONATE NOW <<](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TFjQNyPAEelFbgt42AOxBypd88rKKfGr99ciEiUDiuKXfPZZ4G-rXvoKjdjmN8-jCTMyjmaiRtE-1_NK119RFhoCaC0GK1St6OGQkCFaoRfDO8fKO8yGMaeKg3seR2ThtP0rs0o77ak6KVJF9u82YMvigiWVYuCggWxV-6bA9RdJi_y7xY-KLSeEWsFhLs7a&c=qhKCC-yg1BNhk-bTEqjQ-sIAeDxs2fs6zAns6UnC0zjY67k_rFhLOA==&ch=KXzBgevv_MxVU2P4eY5ykpqiMuH3snoq68pFNCo8yBV137C3lej0wA==)
Thanks for your continued support,
Team Gaetz

name: Matt Putorti
subject: Happy Small Business Saturday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Putorti for Congress
body:
Days like these remind me of the perseverance of my great-grandmother.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39058466/318216781/1720206612?refcode=BLU-PUT-20211127-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2IzMDI3NC1hMzRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vM_U4sEbQsW4a6PlxitmqddcjIckk31L2EoAnuAocjc=)
---
| I hope you take time today to visit your local florist, deli, convenience store, or whatever small businesses are in your community to support the owners and celebrate Small Business Saturday with them.

Days like these remind me of the perseverance of my great-grandmother, who immigrated to the U.S. from Italy as a child and opened a grocery store on the first floor of her home to support her family and make ends meet.

That store is still in my family today after four generations – owned and operated by my parents in Whitehall, New York. Our town is a place where if someone needs help, the community will come together to support them, and that spirit informs so much of why I’m running for Congress. clean_body: Days like these remind me of the perseverance of my great-grandmother. | = | I hope you take time today to visit your local florist, deli, convenience store, or whatever small businesses are in your community to support the owners and celebrate Small Business Saturday with them. Days like these remind me of the perseverance of my great-grandmother, who immigrated to the U.S. from Italy as a child and opened a grocery store on the first floor of her home to support her family and make ends meet. That store is still in my family today after four generations – owned and operated by my parents in Whitehall, New York. Our town is a place where if someone needs help, the community will come together to support them, and that spirit informs so much of why I’m running for Congress. = Helping out at the family business! I want the chance in Congress to stand up for our community the way we do for one another, fight for honorable leadership, and support small businesses across Upstate New York just like my parents’ grocery store. Hi there! I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving with your loved ones. Michael and I had a delicious dinner with the girls and some time to reflect on his achievements this year and his service to come. Michael’s dedication to Colorado, strengthening our nation’s democracy, and setting the next generation up for success is clear. I can see that the promise of Colorado’s future guides his actions whether he’s meeting with constituents here in Colorado or speaking on the Senate floor. He’s focused on delivering for Coloradans, which doesn’t leave much time for fundraising and unfortunately Michael’s team says due to a holiday slowdown in fundraising they’re $12,362 short of where they need to be at this point in the year. Grassroots donations are particularly critical to Michael’s re-election campaign. He’s made a point to turn down corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money because he puts your voice first. He believes fighting money in politics means leading by example. By putting Coloradans first, Michael secured funding to improve Colorado’s infrastructure and create jobs in the recently passed infrastructure bill. Now he’s focused on passing the Build Back Better Act, which includes a one-year extension of the expanded Child Tax Credit that Michael spearheaded and which has already kept three million kids out of poverty this year alone. All this and more makes Michael a top target for the National GOP, so falling short on fundraising is not an option. I can’t wait to see what Michael gets done next and, upon re-election, how he’ll build on his years of service to our state. I had to reach out to you, Peter.
There will likely be a fundraising blackout in December, which means we have to raise as much as we can right now to keep New Mexico blue.
**I won't lie, this is alarming.** If we fail to reach our goals in the next few weeks, we'll start off 2022 behind my Republican challengers, and it will be an uphill battle to stop the GOP from pushing our state further right than ever before.
**[I need all hands on deck to help me raise $150,000 before the end of this month. I know it's an ambitious goal, but – trust me – this is what it takes to win. Will you donate $5 to stop the GOP, Peter?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39058893/318218820/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1114-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzMyMTgyOC1hNDRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-yLACCZc9bZL7IoDcCZCaqPu5nGXcDbhswPs06P56cY=)**

As Governor of New Mexico, I've slashed taxes for working families, raised the minimum wage, legalized cannabis to end the war on drugs, and so much more. But if the GOP flips New Mexico red, they will erase all of our progress and pass dangerous, far-right policies.
Right next door in Texas, Gov. Greg Abbott signed a near-total ban on abortion. **State governments are the first line of defense against extremist policies like these** , which is why it's so important to keep New Mexico blue to defend our personal freedoms.

**[Will you donate $5 today to help me continue to push New Mexico toward a brighter future? In times like these, we can't afford to lose our momentum. name: David
subject: FWD: The gun lobby must be stopped
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| |
---
Peter, I had to reach out right away to make sure you saw the quick one-question survey Letitia sent around yesterday.

**The facts on gun violence are just too despicable to believe:****** Every 11 hours, a New Yorker is killed with a gun. Three million children are exposed to gun violence every day. And thanks to the gun lobby, which refuses to let us pass an assault weapons ban on a federal level, **2021 is on track to be _the deadliest year for gun violence_ in recent memory. **
We still need 22 more responses to this urgent one-question survey by midnight tonight, and it looks like we haven't heard from you yet, Peter. **Please, will you make your voice heard right now and let us know if you believe we should BAN assault weapons? **

**Here's the link to the survey: ****[_https://surveys.signforgood.com/tj4ny-1121-gunviolence_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39058901/318218842/1897835304?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=5,25,50,100&amount=15&code=jtk171-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDMyMTgyOC1hNDRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XOsowdBB0ZlwbQ1QnaicI4blXPhZwAsaBUYHu7UKMAw=&emci=58949e10-ea4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=10321828-a44f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25369504)**
Thank you for making your voice heard.

David
Team James
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Letitia James
Date: Tues, Nov 23, 2021
Subject: Do you think we should BAN assault weapons?
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39058905/318218853/1897835304?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=5,25,50,100&amount=15&code=jtk171-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDMyMTgyOC1hNDRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XOsowdBB0ZlwbQ1QnaicI4blXPhZwAsaBUYHu7UKMAw=&emci=58949e10-ea4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=10321828-a44f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25369504)
Peter,

I'm coming to you today with an urgent request to make your voice heard and end the gun violence epidemic in our nation.

Assault weapons are used in some of the deadliest mass shootings in our country – and what's worse, **2021 is on track to be the deadliest year** for gun violence in recent memory.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39058907/318218860/1897835304?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=5,25,50,100&amount=15&code=jtk171-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDMyMTgyOC1hNDRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XOsowdBB0ZlwbQ1QnaicI4blXPhZwAsaBUYHu7UKMAw=&emci=58949e10-ea4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=10321828-a44f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25369504)
As we fight tooth and nail to pass an assault weapons ban, the gun lobby is doing everything they can to put a stop to this critical progress and let our gun violence epidemic continue unabated.

I have always fought to hold the gun lobby accountable, pass gun control legislation, stand up to banks that fund the makers of assault weapons, and divest NYC's largest pension fund from gun retailers. And I vow to use my office as New York's governor to put an end to the scourge of gun violence once and for all.
But to pass this ban and prevent gun violence, we ALL need to get involved. **That's why I'm reaching out to you today, Peter: I need 1,500 more people to voice their thoughts on banning assault weapons and combating our country's devastating gun violence epidemic. So please, will you let us know where you stand before midnight tonight?**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39058908/318218861/1897835304?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=5,25,50,100&amount=15&code=jtk171-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDMyMTgyOC1hNDRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XOsowdBB0ZlwbQ1QnaicI4blXPhZwAsaBUYHu7UKMAw=&emci=58949e10-ea4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=10321828-a44f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25369504)
Thank you for being on my side in this crucial fight.

Letitia James

name: Val Demings
subject: coming up short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I know our grassroots movement has what it takes to pull ahead and flip Florida blue, but I need to meet tonight's fundraising goal to have a shot.
| | |
---
**This is urgent, friend: ****I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio in a race that experts are saying will decide Senate control**** – but I'm falling short of my midnight fundraising goal at the worst possible moment: **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39059065/318219495/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1709-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTMyMTgyOC1hNDRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amMRl8ievRuxBgNsaUWpH7OHDqPpK0IzHPwpCpmo6jE=)
With your help, this team is closing the polling gap with Rubio – but unfortunately we still don't have enough to compete with the GOP's deep pockets. **I know our grassroots movement has what it takes to pull ahead and flip Florida blue, but I need to meet tonight's fundraising goal to have a shot.**
Florida's last Senate election was decided by just 0.12 points – only 10,033 votes – and this race is bound to be just as close. _Do you know what that means, friend?_ **Every single dollar is going to make a huge impact on our efforts to win in Florida. ****I can't afford to cut a single hour of canvassing or phone banking, because every voter I fail to reach could cost me this election. **
It's urgent, friend: Marco Rubio is breaking fundraising records – and national Republicans have already poured $10 million into this race to keep Democrats like me from winning in Florida again.
**This is a make-or-break moment for my campaign, so I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me close this fundraising gap, pull ahead in the polls and defeat Marco Rubio. It's the only way to defend the Senate majority and defend our democracy from the GOP.**
**[Please, friend, rush $5 right now to help me close this critical fundraising gap. In a race this close, every dollar counts, so I need you to contribute whatever you can to help me defeat Rubio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39059070/318219500/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1709-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTMyMTgyOC1hNDRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amMRl8ievRuxBgNsaUWpH7OHDqPpK0IzHPwpCpmo6jE=)**

I know our grassroots movement has what it takes to pull ahead and flip Florida blue, but I need to meet tonight's fundraising goal to have a shot. Florida's last Senate election was decided by just 0.12 points – only 10,033 votes – and this race is bound to be just as close. Do you know what that means, friend? Every single dollar is going to make a huge impact on our efforts to win in Florida. I can't afford to cut a single hour of canvassing or phone banking, because every voter I fail to reach could cost me this election. It's urgent, friend: Marco Rubio is breaking fundraising records – and national Republicans have already poured $10 million into this race to keep Democrats like me from winning in Florida again. This is a make-or-break moment for my campaign, so I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me close this fundraising gap, pull ahead in the polls and defeat Marco Rubio. Friend,

I hope you had a nice Thanksgiving with family and friends and took some time to reflect on all we have to be thankful for.

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your **[first contribution of $5, $15, or even $35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39059683/318222631/-209993060?refcode=em-112721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjhlYTNmYS1hOTRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8rATD6-Qyf4rZlLDEU5_33yiVm32Gh-Jadm_D75L1ho=)** toward my end-of-month deadline that hits Tuesday. subject: Disappointed we haven't received your reply, Peter 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey Peter,
My name is Olivia. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app.
_Knowing how dedicated you are to our America first movement, we were a bit shocked and disappointed..._
**We know that Big Tech HATES the idea of Trump building his own site WITHOUT blacklists, shadow-banning, and Conservative censorship -- so maybe they're blocking our messages???**
[**If you _are_ receiving this important Republican communication, could you spare a moment to respond right away?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58887858:6FCAF02jN:m:1:3253819041:29D0B05043595538D53370EF386DBCB2:r)
Please choose one of the following options:

---|---
I know you're busy so I'll wrap this up, but I really hope you'll respond.
I'll be going over our final results in about 10 minutes. [**Can I be on the lookout for your answer?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58887858:6FCAF02jN:m:1:3253819041:29D0B05043595538D53370EF386DBCB2:r)

Hi friends!

First off, I hope you all had a wonderful Thanksgiving spent with your friends and family -- whether it's been in-person, over Zoom, or however you were able to celebrate, I hope you had much to be thankful for.

Look, I'll make this quick. We are short of our goal for this month, and the fact is that if we miss this goal, we will not have the funds we need to beat Bryan Steil next year. He's got dark money donors willing to spend anything to keep him in office, and I've got supporters like you reading emails like these over the Thanksgiving weekend.

He's got dark money donors willing to spend anything to keep him in office, and I've got supporters like you reading emails like these over the Thanksgiving weekend. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you so much for everything, I am truly thankful to have you on this team. \-- Ann = = *

| | Hi there Peter, Yesterday the team sent out a campaign memo and I’m double checking to make sure you saw it. Our strategy to win NC-14 and pave a new path forward guided by love, hope, and empathy relies on us working as a team. I know that we have what it takes to reach our $30,000 end-of-month goal. Together, we can show Republicans that we reject right-wing insurrectionists and extremism doesn’t represent who we are in Western North Carolina. Last quarter we raised over $320,000 to replace Madison Cawthorn and deliver real leadership to NC-14. But now we’re falling behind on our end-of-month goal and need to catch up. I know we can outraise our new opponent -- Republican and Cawthorn ally Michele Woodhouse -- but it’s going to take all of us coming together and stepping up. Now that Jasmine’s grassroots momentum has scared Republican Madison Cawthorn out of running for re-election in his home district, we wanted to share why that means Jasmine is strongly positioned to win this race.
* **Organizing Everywhere is still the name of the game.** NC-14 is now one of the only competitive Congressional districts in the state. Jasmine is running the most grassroots campaign -- and supporters are responding. Since we launched, she has criss-crossed the district, holding events everywhere from parking lots to front porches and knocking doors in some of the reddest counties. We can’t afford to leave a single vote on the table, especially if we want to compete with potentially high Republican turnout in a midterm year. By the end of the year, our team will have knocked doors in all 15 counties in NC-14 -- as of today, we’ve knocked in 12 of them. Our monthly Days of Action have involved dozens of people joining us each month to knock doors, make phone calls, and write postcards. All of this is building the foundation of the largest grassroots organizing operation WNC has ever seen.

* **Jasmine is outraising the crowded primary field.** She is the most viable candidate and has the resources to win the primary and the general. We don’t rely on corrupt dark money from shady special interests that expect promises in return. We rely on our grassroots donors like you to help us meet our goals -- like the one we have coming up on November 30th. We have received grassroots donations from every county in Western NC and a total of more than 24,000 donations since we launched. Each one represents someone stepping up with us and this grassroots momentum is critical as we head into the heart of the primary season.

* **We need a candidate who can counteract misinformation and extremism with a message that brings people together.** This campaign is centered around creating a new kind of politics. From day one, Jasmine’s message has been based on love, hope, faith, and empathy -- paving a new path forward for Western North Carolina built on collaboration and an understanding of the issues that need to be addressed. We are sharing this message when we knock doors, through videos that have reached more than 1 million people, and through targeted outreach to voters across WNC.

This campaign isn’t Jasmine’s alone, **it belongs to all of us.** Together, we can erase the damage that Madison Cawthorn created and left behind. Together, we can invest in a better future for everyone here in our new district.
But we wouldn’t have made it this far without your support and we can’t stop now. With the expansion of our district, we need to continue pushing forward and doing our best to speak with everyone we can about the issues that matter most to them.
[**This is our campaign, and together we have what it takes to win. Can we count on you to chip in $25 or more today to help us reach our end-of-month goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39060293/318225045/1055886451?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211127_FR_EOM4MemoBump_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWMyMGZkMy1hYjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tV90R1VNCPRaG7n7TF8tu5oAoMCgdIXbM1uOopb8Eec=)

clean_body: First, the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act was signed into law by President Biden. Then, Kim voted to pass the Build Back Better Act in the House. These are two critical pieces of legislation that will make historic investments in our nation's infrastructure and families. It's been an exciting month in Congress, Peter! First, the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act was signed into law by President Biden. Then, Kim voted to pass the Build Back Better Act in the House. These are two critical pieces of legislation that will make historic investments in our nation's infrastructure and families. Kim and her Democratic colleagues in the House have already made great progress for our country, but there's still work to be done. We're counting on your support to help us hit our end-of-month goal before Tuesday at midnight to help Kim keep fighting in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Peter -- all the progress that we've made could all be at risk if Republicans take back the House next year. That's why it's crucial we protect Kim's seat and our Democratic House majority in the midterms, but it won't be easy. Republicans only need to flip five seats to take back the majority and they've named Kim a top target. With the first public poll in our race showing this is a one-point race and GOP dark money groups already starting their attacks, it's clear we have another tough fight ahead of us. It's clear Biden is keeping his promises and building back even better – but not everyone is on board. Biden may have the support of the majority of Democrats, but Mitch McConnell is doing everything he can to BLOCK Biden's agenda – so we need to make it CRYSTAL CLEAR where we stand. Friend,

We hope that your Thanksgiving celebrations this year were everything you wanted them to be. We certainly know everyone here at HQ is still working to shake off the last of those post-turkey naps and get back into shape, because these next few weeks are going to be wild.

**We're just $1,189 away from hitting our goal for this month.[Will you help us go into the holiday rush with the power of grassroots families on our side?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39060949/318228117/956498204?refcode=EM_FR_211127eom1_EOM_TC_OP_5_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjU4YTllZS1hZDRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4R0em7SrZy3cwjeq8oliMI4GT-oIVpClHJiK5EA8Su0=)**

It may just be November ending now, but before we know it, it’s already going to be time for the New Year. We cannot let all of the hustle and bustle distract us from our goals: protecting Ohio’s elections with a new Secretary of State.

**You shouldn’t have to worry about your democracy this holiday season. Chelsea is going to keep fighting in the sun, rain, or snow.** We want your memories from this time to be the good moments with your families and loved ones, not huddled around the television watching more scary news.

So let’s all come together and head into the last month of this year with all the strength Ohio can muster. **[We’re ready to hit our mark, if you can donate $10 or more right now to hit our $1,189 end-of-month goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39060950/318228118/956498204?refcode=EM_FR_211127eom1_EOM_TC_OP_5_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjU4YTllZS1hZDRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4R0em7SrZy3cwjeq8oliMI4GT-oIVpClHJiK5EA8Su0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39060951/318228119/956498204?refcode=EM_FR_211127eom1_EOM_TC_OP_5_NG_N_el10&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjU4YTllZS1hZDRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4R0em7SrZy3cwjeq8oliMI4GT-oIVpClHJiK5EA8Su0=)

clean_body: Thanksgiving may be over, but our fight isn’t. | = Friend, We hope that your Thanksgiving celebrations this year were everything you wanted them to be. We certainly know everyone here at HQ is still working to shake off the last of those post-turkey naps and get back into shape, because these next few weeks are going to be wild. We're just $1,189 away from hitting our goal for this month.= It may just be November ending now, but before we know it, it’s already going to be time for the New Year. We cannot let all of the hustle and bustle distract us from our goals: protecting Ohio’s elections with a new Secretary of State. You shouldn’t have to worry about your democracy this holiday season. Chelsea is going to keep fighting in the sun, rain, or snow. We want your memories from this time to be the good moments with your families and loved ones, not huddled around the television watching more scary news. So let’s all come together and head into the last month of this year with all the strength Ohio can muster. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Let's keep going, Team Chelsea | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. name: Mike Collier HQ
subject: 5,000 miles (and counting!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Did y’all hear the news? Mike and our team recently hit _5,000 miles_ on the road barnstorming across Texas. And we’re just getting started. When we first launched this campaign, Mike made a promise that this would be a true 254 county effort, learning what our regional and local priorities should be, and building an agenda that reflects them. Now that we’re officially 5,000 miles in, here’s what we’ve learned: **Folks from all over Texas are hungry for honest, transparent, enthusiastic leadership. Leadership that listens and learns. They want to hold Dan Patrick accountable. And just like Mike, they’re ready to do right and risk the consequences. ** Mike has made it clear, he will campaign as he will govern. We will fight to earn every vote in every county — red, blue, urban, and rural counties — one mile at a time. But we absolutely cannot do it without your support. So, we’re treating this campaign like a job application, which involves building genuine relationships with folks across the state and listening to them so we can build a real Texas agenda. [**We need all hands on deck to build a brighter future for all Texans. But first, we have to hit our upcoming end-of-month goal. Can you pitch in today to help us elect Mike for Lieutenant Governor of Texas and keep us out on the road?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39060959/318228128/2022723758?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211127_PM1_V3_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTU4YTllZS1hZDRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R5KNlDlTda5oQPURgCTeBcTAXr2fn62W7ouY49eZwEU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39060960/318228129/2022723758?express_lane=true&amount=5&&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211127_PM1_V3_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTU4YTllZS1hZDRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R5KNlDlTda5oQPURgCTeBcTAXr2fn62W7ouY49eZwEU=)

clean_body: | Did y’all hear the news? Mike and our team recently hit 5,000 miles on the road barnstorming across Texas. And we’re just getting started. When we first launched this campaign, Mike made a promise that this would be a true 254 county effort, learning what our regional and local priorities should be, and building an agenda that reflects them. Now that we’re officially 5,000 miles in, here’s what we’ve learned: Folks from all over Texas are hungry for honest, transparent, enthusiastic leadership. Leadership that listens and learns. They want to hold Dan Patrick accountable. And just like Mike, they’re ready to do right and risk the consequences. Mike has made it clear, he will campaign as he will govern. We will fight to earn every vote in every county — red, blue, urban, and rural counties — one mile at a time. But we absolutely cannot do it without your support. So, we’re treating this campaign like a job application, which involves building genuine relationships with folks across the state and listening to them so we can build a real Texas agenda. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = You have our word that we spread every dollar you give us as far as it will go, and you bet that we will fight everyday to improve the lives of ALL Texans — regardless of race, income, or zip code. Thanks for chipping in, if you can. Team Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Democrats are lying
body:
The Democrats do nothing but lie to you. The Democrats lie about . . .
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FWe5ShwbadVs3WWEfeU-BNb9k0p7Ae6XyFTX2GJg-aW6AInd4UNoJO5-BLZKjoxErIDvYAl8d5E6J5Heqx4oAt9YUBcaQeVoR8cvxU0Fow--JvyFVsbN1V7SF_BFeNX5TLGtV0myKPCvxMhnZLssKX_sAwqk7XJFw2Vx_wU1g6VMBPs1k43RCA==&c=P752UtxfIjoGCoVp0oy3Blzk5DpCR6AzHLuNZtyUunUBgxvR-gxAoA==&ch=IxVMNutiuNyPYTnHy-MePmBC-nxAuOQNhzJ4jc6-X_weTQ6QxxSWKA==)
---
| Peter,

The Democrats do nothing but lie to you.
The Democrats lie about . . .

* Vaccine mandates. They said there wouldn't be vaccine mandates. Now people are losing their jobs unless they do as they're told.

* Withdrawing from Afghanistan. The whole process was a mess. Vulnerable men, women, and children were left behind to pay the price for the Democrats mistakes.

* Teaching CRT in schools. Not only is the government forcing our children to divide the world by racial lines, they are punishing parents for raising objections.

* Securing our Elections. Biden and the Democrats claim that our elections are secure. Then they block every attempt to verify the truth and determine whether our elections are secure.

* Rittenhouse. The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) chairman lied entirely about Jacob Blake and continues to spread lies about Rittenhouse.

The Left's hidden agenda is unraveling as American patriots hold them accountable. [Peter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FWe5ShwbadVs3WWEfeU-BNb9k0p7Ae6XyFTX2GJg-aW6AInd4UNoJO5-BLZKjoxErIDvYAl8d5E6J5Heqx4oAt9YUBcaQeVoR8cvxU0Fow--JvyFVsbN1V7SF_BFeNX5TLGtV0myKPCvxMhnZLssKX_sAwqk7XJFw2Vx_wU1g6VMBPs1k43RCA==&c=P752UtxfIjoGCoVp0oy3Blzk5DpCR6AzHLuNZtyUunUBgxvR-gxAoA==&ch=IxVMNutiuNyPYTnHy-MePmBC-nxAuOQNhzJ4jc6-X_weTQ6QxxSWKA==)[, will you generously contribute $20.22, $50. $100, or any amount today to help me put an end to the lies?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FWe5ShwbadVs3WWEfeU-BNb9k0p7Ae6XyFTX2GJg-aW6AInd4UNoJO5-BLZKjoxErIDvYAl8d5E6J5Heqx4oAt9YUBcaQeVoR8cvxU0Fow--JvyFVsbN1V7SF_BFeNX5TLGtV0myKPCvxMhnZLssKX_sAwqk7XJFw2Vx_wU1g6VMBPs1k43RCA==&c=P752UtxfIjoGCoVp0oy3Blzk5DpCR6AzHLuNZtyUunUBgxvR-gxAoA==&ch=IxVMNutiuNyPYTnHy-MePmBC-nxAuOQNhzJ4jc6-X_weTQ6QxxSWKA==)
The Democrats are frightened of losing power. They need to control Congress, the White House, and the American people. It's why they're spending MILLIONS of dollars in Ohio to flip this seat.
The Left lies to maintain control. But that control is slipping away, as true patriots like you stand up and hold them accountable for their lies.
Peter, I'm not a politician. I don't have the Swamp PACs and corporations on my side. I am a businessman like President Trump.
I'm relying on generous people like you to stand with me and show the Left that we won't fall for their lies.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Axe the Income Tax! – update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132146?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**It's time to give Mississippi a boost and get our state growing.** Abolishing the state income tax would do that, giving every Mississippi worker a pay raise and ensuring they have more money to spend on their priorities and families.

**Right now, Mississippi’s budget has a stonking surplus of almost $1 billion – We can afford to Axe the Tax!** Rather than wait for politicians to figure out ways of spending the surplus, let’s give taxpayers something back by allowing workers to keep more of what they earn.

Ronald Reagan once said _“Government does not tax to get the money it needs; government always finds a need for the money it gets.”** **_**If we don’t abolish the state income tax, state officials will soon find a need to spend that surplus.**

As Mississippi’s leading free market advocacy organization, we have launched the _Axe the Tax_ campaign to make the case for change. We are highlighting to hundreds of thousands of Mississippians the argument in favor of abolishing the income tax:
* **Tax break for working families.** The Governor’s executive budget recommendations suggests an individual with a taxable income of $40,000 would be $1,850 better off if income tax was eliminated.
* **Make Mississippi more competitive.** Neither Florida, Tennessee, nor Texas have state income taxes, and all three have prospered.
* **Good for entrepreneurs.** Mississippi has a long history of giving tax cuts to big corporations. An abolition of the income tax would be a break that helps ordinary businesses – not just those that are well connected in Jackson.
* **It’s fair!** Abolishing the income tax means a tax break for every worker.

It is essential that tax abolition is done sensibly by balancing the books. Tax cuts can’t be paid for out of thin air.

We believe that there is common ground for an agreement to abolish the state income tax, using a combination of the budget surplus, and future growth in tax revenues to scrap the tax. And we will be popularizing the case for change in 2022!

Have a great weekend!
---
|
---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|

| | I promise I won’t keep you long.

[**_My husband, Tony, is $12,883 short of his important End-of-Month Goal, so I told him I’d lend him a hand. I’m sure you’d rather spend time with your loved ones than read through fundraising emails so, if you can spare a few bucks, will you chip in to Tony’s campaign now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39061349/318229957/1129282168?refcode=20211127_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjA3YjMxZS1iMjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OcCmGS3PNhsVcsJCNZWTlXHTRdGb0Kbo--nChw9ySlc=)

It was so nice getting to enjoy the holiday with Tony and our little turkeys, Ava and Luca. Tony’s facing an urgent fundraising deadline, and your support will have a huge impact.

[**Here’s why:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39061354/318229964/1129282168?refcode=20211127_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjA3YjMxZS1iMjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OcCmGS3PNhsVcsJCNZWTlXHTRdGb0Kbo--nChw9ySlc=)

One of the things I admire most about Tony is that he never compromises on his values.

When Tony decided to run for Congress, he knew he wanted to run a grassroots campaign.

Because Tony’s running to be a fighter for everyday people, like you and me.

And he wants his supporters to feel confident he’s working for them -- not shady special interests.

[**Unlike his opponent, Republican Don Bacon, who accepts checks from Koch Industries and lobbyists.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39061355/318229965/1129282168?refcode=20211127_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjA3YjMxZS1iMjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OcCmGS3PNhsVcsJCNZWTlXHTRdGb0Kbo--nChw9ySlc=)

But that means Tony has to work even harder to reach his critical fundraising goals.

And he can’t do it alone.

[**_To win this race for working families, Tony has to run ads, reach voters, and more. But these tools aren’t cheap. If Tony can reach his End-of-Month Goal, he’ll cover these costs -- and then some. I told you I wouldn’t take up too much of your time so let me just end on this: I know if we all band together, Tony will win this close race and fight for ALL of us in Congress. | _Josh Riley is a Democrat running for Congress to bring Upstate New York Square Deal values to Washington.**If you do not wish to receive important updates about Josh's campaign, please[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9a9b48b1-634d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/905b7edf-b34f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDViN2VkZi1iMzRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaQ0U5mEQpGXze5jkzoTEDu5XrvRUNsv_4WDU9Sb0Rw=&id=106311268).**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39061459/318230700/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20211127-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDViN2VkZi1iMzRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaQ0U5mEQpGXze5jkzoTEDu5XrvRUNsv_4WDU9Sb0Rw=)

| Peter,

When I was growing up, my grandparents instilled in me an appreciation for the Square Deal—**the simple promise that if you work hard and play by the rules, you could earn a spot in the Middle Class.**

But that promise has been broken by a culture of greed on Wall Street, a culture of corruption in Congress, and career politicians who are more interested in lining their own pockets than serving the needs of their constituents.

[_**I’m running for Congress, as a new voice, because I believe working families deserve a fair shot at the Middle Class. Will you consider chipping in $22 today so we can win NY-22 in 2022?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39061460/318230701/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20211127-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDViN2VkZi1iMzRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaQ0U5mEQpGXze5jkzoTEDu5XrvRUNsv_4WDU9Sb0Rw=)

I’m not a politician. This is my first time running for office, and I’m doing it because I believe the purpose of public service is to improve the lives of others, not to enrich oneself--and we have a lot of work to do, together.

**I’m not accepting a dime from corporate PACs.** I can’t be bought, and I won’t answer to special interests or dark money donors. I’ll work every single day to right by the hard-working people of Upstate New York—people who deserve better than what they’re getting out of their representation today.

[_**If you’re able, please contribute $22 to help us build a winning campaign. I rely on grassroots support, and every dollar counts →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39061463/318230704/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20211127-1-EM&amount=22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDViN2VkZi1iMzRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaQ0U5mEQpGXze5jkzoTEDu5XrvRUNsv_4WDU9Sb0Rw=)

Together, we can win this seat.

With gratitude today and always,

clean_body: When I was growing up, my grandparents instilled in me an appreciation for the Square Deal—the simple promise that if you work hard and play by the rules, you could earn a spot in the Middle Class. | Josh Riley is a Democrat running for Congress to bring Upstate New York Square Deal values to Washington.If you do not wish to receive important updates about Josh's campaign, please. = | Peter, When I was growing up, my grandparents instilled in me an appreciation for the Square Deal—the simple promise that if you work hard and play by the rules, you could earn a spot in the Middle Class. But that promise has been broken by a culture of greed on Wall Street, a culture of corruption in Congress, and career politicians who are more interested in lining their own pockets than serving the needs of their constituents. = | | | = | = I’m not a politician. This is my first time running for office, and I’m doing it because I believe the purpose of public service is to improve the lives of others, not to enrich oneself--and we have a lot of work to do, together. I’m not accepting a dime from corporate PACs. I can’t be bought, and I won’t answer to special interests or dark money donors. I’ll work every single day to right by the hard-working people of Upstate New York—people who deserve better than what they’re getting out of their representation today. = Together, we can win this seat. With gratitude today and always, Josh Riley * | | = Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress Josh Riley for Congress PO Box 7160 200 Washington Ave Endicott, NY 13760 United States | | ---|--- | = Communicating by email is a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with you, but if you no longer would like to receive emails, you can click here to

clean_body: Dear Peter— Our team wanted to ensure you saw Patrick’s email inviting you to his fundraiser happening in just 3 days! We’ll be brief, but be sure to check out Patrick’s message below for more information. When: November 30, 6 p.m. - 8 p.m. Where: The Capitol Hill Club, 300 First Street, SE, Washington DC Who: With special guests Rep. Madison Cawthorn (NC-11) and Ned Ryun (American Majority) You can RSVP by contacting Katy Cannon Pearce at mailto:katy@cannongroupdc.com "katy@cannongroupdc.com". We hope to see you there, Peter! Best, Team Witt \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Patrick Witt Subject: Did you see who is coming to our fundraiser? To: Dear Peter, I’m excited to announce we will be holding a fundraiser in Washington D.C. on November 30 with special guests, Rep. Madison Cawthorn (NC-11) and Ned Ryun (American Majority). If you’d like to attend the fundraiser, please RSVP to Katy Cannon Pearce at mailto:katy@cannongroupdc.com. Rep. Cawthorn is the youngest person elected to Congress since 1964. He is an unapologetic fighter for the America First agenda and a rising star in the House of Representatives. Ned Ryun is a staunch Trump ally and CEO of the conservative organization, American Majority. If you’re in DC on November 30, we would love to see you at our fundraiser. But even if you can’t make it in person, - Thank you, Patrick | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2021 Patrick Witt for Congress, All rights reserved.

Hi team,
**[With _three_ days until our monthly fundraising deadline expires, will you chip in to help our campaign stay on track to reach our $10,000 goal? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39061704/318232535/-1116019946?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211127_PM1_V3_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGYyZGIzNy1iNDRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgcAMhn_bcj3fBCy-u9ft-NoeHiEdKKqmo41IrH-ryQ=)**
Mondaire has been working around the clock to get the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ and the _Build Back Better Act_ passed to deliver critical relief for working families across the country.
Mondaire stood firm and insisted that life-changing benefits and programs were included in the _Build Back Better Act._ Once it passes the Senate, every year for the next decade, our country will see millions of new good-paying jobs, child poverty will continue to be cut in half through the extension of monthly Child Tax Credit payments, child care will be affordable for every family in America, and billions will be invested in expanding access to clean drinking water.
These benefits and so many more will directly improve the lives of families throughout Westchester and Rockland Counties — and none of this would have been possible without our Democratic majority in the House of Representatives.
**[Team, please chip in today to support Mondaire’s re-election campaign and help defend our Democratic majority. body:
Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE! This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God
_Sponsored message_
| | | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zkcam1jlkbskmv425huonmicvk6r761ensp86ipg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1j69or2chh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life – **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgcc97epmda054e46ufb9vd6pakjobt8jbkdsaog_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1j69or2chh2bs)**
|
---

|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you. With love, Wendy Rittenhouse | | | | Copyright © 2021 Free Kyle USA, All rights reserved. | | | Hey, Peter, Governor Kim Reynolds here.

The need for strong, conservative state leaders is greater than ever in our country. _Like me, I am sure you have watched crisis after crisis unfold at the hands of Joe Biden_.

And, just like me, you and your families are suffering the consequences of the radical left's FAILED liberal agenda:

❌** _RISING_** inflation
❌** _HIGHER_** gas prices
❌** _ENDLESS _**lockdowns

But over the past several months,** GOP state leaders have joined together** to expose Biden's failed liberal agenda. GOP state allies have:

✅** _BANNED_** mask mandates
✅** _OPENED_** our states
