Elizabeth and her progressive colleagues have been working tirelessly to advance legislation that provides relief to the people who need it the most. Yet despite some major victories, next year’s midterms will be an uphill fight. The Mitch McConnell Republicans are already looking to take back our hard-fought Congressional majorities so they can put Washington on the side of the rich and powerful.
But we’re not content with settling for the majorities we already have —it’s about expanding our Democratic majorities and electing more Warren Democrats from coast to coast, so our progressive policy ideas aren’t prone to such razor-thin margins. This grassroots movement will fight to be the difference between a government that works for everyone, and a government that only works for a select few.
Making a grassroots donation before our November deadline puts our team in the best position to not only hold onto the House and the Senate, but also put more folks like Elizabeth in those seats to join her in this fight.

clean_body: Help make a real difference to fight alongside Elizabeth and Warren Democrats like her nationwide. | | | We’ll get right to it: Our November grassroots fundraising deadline is coming right up, and If we miss the mark on our November goal, it’ll be that much harder to hit our target by the FEC deadline at the end of the year. And reaching these goals makes it possible for us to keep organizing around Elizabeth and other Warren Democrats as we prepare for next year’s midterms. Each donation, no matter how big or small, makes it possible for this grassroots movement to help elect more progressive Democrats who believe in the big, structural change we’re fighting for every day. Only together can we protect and expand our Democratic majorities in Congress, and fight for the bold policies Americans need for our future. | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | | | | | Elizabeth and her progressive colleagues have been working tirelessly to advance legislation that provides relief to the people who need it the most. Yet despite some major victories, next year’s midterms will be an uphill fight. The Mitch McConnell Republicans are already looking to take back our hard-fought Congressional majorities so they can put Washington on the side of the rich and powerful. But we’re not content with settling for the majorities we already have —it’s about expanding our Democratic majorities and electing more Warren Democrats from coast to coast, so our progressive policy ideas aren’t prone to such razor-thin margins. This grassroots movement will fight to be the difference between a government that works for everyone, and a government that only works for a select few. Making a grassroots donation before our November deadline puts our team in the best position to not only hold onto the House and the Senate, but also put more folks like Elizabeth in those seats to join her in this fight. = Thanks for the continued support, Team Warren = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2021 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

Hi -- It's Sarah again.

We just need a couple more replies. [**Please, respond now and then I promise to stop flooding your inbox.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2y4x3-1mohy-4qqlpo3/)

Hi again,
I wasn’t planning on doing this but I’m really hoping you’ll respond if I try one last time...
**Nearly everyone on this list said they’re on Trump’s team, not with the Liberals.** Now I have the task of contacting the last remaining hold outs -- _including you._
[**I was able to extend your deadline to respond for just 10 more minutes. Can you take a moment to answer?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2y4x3-1moi0-4qqlpo1/)
_\-- Sarah_

Subject: quick question for you_
Hey there,
My name is Sarah. I’m reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump’s brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven’t you responded? Would you join Trump’s site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump →](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2y4x3-1moi2-4qqlpo3/)**
**[No. I Don’t Support Trump →](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2y4x3-1moi3-4qqlpo4/)**
President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots. **
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2y4x3-1moi4-4qqlpo5/)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah

name: Holly McCormack
subject: Small Business Saturday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter,
I’m writing today to share my deepest appreciation for all of our nation’s veterans. Growing up on army bases and in a family full of veterans, I learned discipline very early on and that service is meant to be selfless.
Today, we want to honor members of the Armed Forces that have defended our nation’s freedom and protected our country's future.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88943/images/Image%20from%20iOS%20%2851%29.jpg]Today also reminds us that we must do more to protect our veterans when they re-enter civilian life. After returning home many veterans are not given adequate support. GA-14 has a considerable veteran population yet we only have one VA hospital in the district and no veterans’ cemeteries . We must do better. We will do better. That's why I'm running to change the way that we treat our veterans when they return home.
We owe a debt to those who’ve placed their lives on the line to protect our freedom as Americans, and we have to do better to provide for their care and to honor their sacrifices.
Sincerely,
Holly McCormack.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1111] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] http://www.hollyforcongress.org/ [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]

Ringgold, GA 30736

There is ONE thing that fires me up even more than a roaring stadium full of Bulldogs on Rivalry Saturday in the Peach State... And that’s our current fight for the future of America and the U.S. Senate.

Fellow Conservative,

It's the most wonderful time of the year, and I'm not talking about Christmas.

**I'm talking about Rivalry Saturday!**

There is ONE thing that fires me up even more than a roaring stadium full of Bulldogs on Rivalry Saturday in the Peach State... **And that’s our current fight for the future of America and the U.S. Senate.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ae17c9a80a9f4d6c9f7669d40528637d&_e=5qIzXKmjmTZCLkLDp1JwL7NNtzOGrsvQOmETovAgxiyr_OOFTC2bYuoudjnXNx-Ms6SZ-ULxVBf-aZAvrVSmej2jf4yz0D7S8bPnd33eCCk27Gpd4V4p1dJmEn2vISr8T7yB7M1RZtnx_hti-6EHyZ4ihMTr3BecdDS1uWuu2ZeSaMZI0Iw__etnwLKIv3hecLWXK2BiDAqLJKdzHSoBSD7A5cmiTy7Jf0Z1W3g2bh4iYVPqMfOAByu60ucTIXNRdfnpg6geFVkKHsUMWDMMvdr1Jj1YT4PPdN8YJsrAuPIQT3X6pnyNa8BsCiYOjcc91xbqOl0lX9Fa167i9-aZ3DS9Sk_F3p5a9-rgaw6qh4ZAWo1dGI_HXFhVu7s-CRjb7cpCR8tCpOe-QfswsHqQwsSHGJNruDyyCuEFLG9KbPDqRBawgxFkPGxdlC7t8kv-OV8qSG-UZs5oWo84cQHW3tQLUh8kUWO9KNK9PX0MVUF76nOGAVKPPrxWne5rm15z)

Our campaign to WIN BACK Georgia’s Senate seat is about making our government smaller, promoting personal responsibility, supporting our military, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to live the American Dream.

It was a team effort for to win during my football career at Georgia, and we need that same team effort today. Please support our campaign and help us WIN THIS RACE and WIN BACK the Senate majority.

And just like that one guest at the other end of the Thanksgiving table where all the good sides wound up, I’m going to ask you for one more thing. **Our end-of-month grassroots fundraising deadline is coming up, and we have a big goal to hit. name: Team Booker
subject: Fired up and ready
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Earlier this month, Charles announced the Kentucky New Deal — a bold, new
vision for our Commonwealth — and the response we’ve received so far has
been overwhelming.

The Kentucky New Deal will center the people of Kentucky to build lasting
infrastructure, break down barriers to democracy, end generational
poverty, build new statewide coalitions, and so much more.

The Kentucky New Deal is a way for us to show the nation that enough is
enough, and everyday people have had it with the lies, corruption, and
suffering.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13324?refcode=em20211127-1271&t=1001&akid=1271%2E346206%2ElaVlwQ ]Crowd of Kentucky New Deal supporters

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13324?refcode=em20211127-1271&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1271%2E346206%2ElaVlwQ ]After running the numbers and taking stock of what our campaign needs
in order to be best set up for success going into the election year —
we’ve set a goal to raise $20,220 over email by the end of the month. Will
you please chip in $5 or whatever you can afford?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13324?refcode=em20211127-1271&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1271%2E346206%2ElaVlwQ ]DONATE $5 NOW →

Peter, Charles
is fired up and ready to share this vision. We’re ready to finally address
the deep, lasting challenges that have debilitated us for too long.

The Kentucky New Deal will be transformative for our Commonwealth, and we
want to be able to travel all across our Commonwealth to talk about the
Kentucky New Deal with Kentuckians — and meet them where they’re at, from
the hood to the holler.

But meetings like this and campaign travel are expensive, and it’s one of
the reasons why having strong fundraising — and hitting every goal from
here on out — is so crucial to the success of our campaign.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13324?refcode=em20211127-1271&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1271%2E346206%2ElaVlwQ ]So, can we please count on you to chip in $5 or
anything you can afford towards our $20,220 goal so we can make things
like the Kentucky New Deal a reality?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13324?refcode=em20211127-1271&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1271%2E346206%2ElaVlwQ ]DONATE $5 NOW →

Thank you,
Peter. More soon,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211127-1271-footer&t=1025&refcode2=1271_346206_laVlwQ&akid=1271%2E346206%2ElaVlwQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1271%2E346206%2ElaVlwQ

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Mark Kelly
subject: with gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
I have an important request for you today. I want to ask you to make a donation to support this campaign. But before I ask, I first want to express my gratitude for all you’ve done to get us to this moment.
Thanks to your efforts in 2020, we brought real change to Congress. I’m amazed every day by the grassroots team we’ve built and the ability we have to improve people’s lives.
Because as we’ve known all along, last year’s election was just the beginning. The real work is happening now, and it has never been more urgent for us to bring change for Americans.
So far, we’ve delivered relief to millions of Americans during the COVID crisis. We passed a historic bipartisan infrastructure bill. And right now, we’re working to lower costs and cut taxes as we rebuild our economy. But National Republicans aren’t happy about that. They’ve made it clear their top priority is beating us next November.
We have to do everything we can to hold this seat, and I’m going to need you with me. We’ve set a 50,000 donation goal that we need to hit before the end of the month, so today I have to ask:
[**If you’re able, will you make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our goals.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211127-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1713_6688874_0T5peu&akid=1713%2E6688874%2E0T5peu)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211127-1-15&t=20&refcode2=1713_6688874_0T5peu&akid=1713%2E6688874%2E0T5peu)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em211127-1-15&t=21&refcode2=1713_6688874_0T5peu&akid=1713%2E6688874%2E0T5peu)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211127-1-15&t=22&refcode2=1713_6688874_0T5peu&akid=1713%2E6688874%2E0T5peu)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211127-1-15&t=23&refcode2=1713_6688874_0T5peu&akid=1713%2E6688874%2E0T5peu)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em211127-1-15&t=24&refcode2=1713_6688874_0T5peu&akid=1713%2E6688874%2E0T5peu)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&refcode=em211127-1-15&t=25&refcode2=1713_6688874_0T5peu&akid=1713%2E6688874%2E0T5peu)**
---
****
We’re going to check back in over the course of the rest of the month to update you on our progress towards this goal. I’m hopeful that with your support we can continue fueling this people-powered campaign to improve people’s lives.
I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you’ve put into this campaign. It means the world to me to have so many of you supporting us and the fight for our shared values.
Full speed ahead!
— Mark Kelly

clean_body: Friends — I have an important request for you today. I want to ask you to make a donation to support this campaign. But before I ask, I first want to express my gratitude for all you’ve done to get us to this moment. Thanks to your efforts in 2020, we brought real change to Congress. I’m amazed every day by the grassroots team we’ve built and the ability we have to improve people’s lives. Because as we’ve known all along, last year’s election was just the beginning. The real work is happening now, and it has never been more urgent for us to bring change for Americans. So far, we’ve delivered relief to millions of Americans during the COVID crisis. We passed a historic bipartisan infrastructure bill. And right now, we’re working to lower costs and cut taxes as we rebuild our economy. But National Republicans aren’t happy about that. They’ve made it clear their top priority is beating us next November. We have to do everything we can to hold this seat, and I’m going to need you with me. We’ve set a 50,000 donation goal that we need to hit before the end of the month, so today I have to ask: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** We’re going to check back in over the course of the rest of the month to update you on our progress towards this goal. I’m hopeful that with your support we can continue fueling this people-powered campaign to improve people’s lives. I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you’ve put into this campaign. It means the world to me to have so many of you supporting us and the fight for our shared values. Full speed ahead! — Mark Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

body:
The whole country is watching my race. |

https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-deadline?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211127_tinaramirez_november-end-of-month-deadline
Friend,

Virginia is in the midst of a Red Wave -- even the far-left Washington Post had to admit it!

“Republicans rise from the ashes as Democrats ponder what went wrong...”
(source: Washington Post)
And now, the whole country is looking to my Virginia Congressional Race -- to see if we can keep it going.

That’s why this November’s End-of-Month goal is the most critical deadline my campaign has faced yet.

On top of that, I just checked our campaign funds this morning, and we’re still $15,000 behind on our goal.
Friend, coming up short is not an option.

So please, make a contribution of any amount you can to ensure we reach our goal to flip this Virginia congressional district RED. name: Senate Majority Alert
subject: Will we take back Trump’s majority?
body:

I’m not going to lie, the odds are stacked against us. With the Democrats controlling the mainstream media AND big tech censorship, it’s going to be an uphill battle to spread our MAGA message to hardworking Americans.
_But luckily, our team has a secret weapon: patriots like you._
With the Democrat elite in power, this race **depends on everyday, hardworking Americans** , and now is your time to show the world you stand behind President Trump more than ever.

clean_body: Fellow conservative, As 2022 approaches, there’s one question on our minds: will we be able to take back President Trump’s Senate majority? I’m not going to lie, the odds are stacked against us. With the Democrats controlling the mainstream media AND big tech censorship, it’s going to be an uphill battle to spread our MAGA message to hardworking Americans. But luckily, our team has a secret weapon: patriots like you. With the Democrat elite in power, this race depends on everyday, hardworking Americans , and now is your time to show the world you stand behind President Trump more than ever. Our FINAL end of month deadline of 2021 is just a few days away, and we need your help to meet our goal. With so many races neck-and-neck, this deadline is critical to our mission to save America - but we can’t achieve this major goal without you on our team. Please make a contribution TODAY so we can meet our FINAL end of month goal of 2021 and do our part to SAVE AMERICA with a pro-Trump MAGA Senate majority. We need patriots from across the country to join the fight and do their part to help win back the Senate majority. This is a team effort! Thank you for your ongoing support of me and Senate Republicans.

Peter,

I’m tired. Campaigning for Congress is a 24/7 365-day job. As Candidates, we work weekends, night, early mornings – every chance is an opportunity for us to meet with voters and prospective supporters.

But I’ve got to tell you that after running for Congress in 2020 and again this year, I’m tired. My campaign staff and I haven’t had a day off since May and we’re getting worn down. But, taking a day off will cost us. We won’t be able to call donors, write emails like these, or knock-on doors and tell people why I’m running for Congress, and asking for their vote.

We’ve crunched the numbers and determined what we would need to raise online in order to justify taking a much-needed rest day: $5785 by midnight tonight.

**[Do you think you’d be willing to chip in a couple of dollars right now so that my team and I can take a day off the campaign trail to recharge?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=70e2ebea57e5430089734261d02bc766&_e=L9bCm-xR86NIAAViIAz69jwklo8gE_hDzIO3K2TfNaRJ8TJ4NlIRpb7FrTgUFPsCCN0RCF03vKXy2ZUb_ynrkwVi1G8JczAjY3hNTYWpnbwDSnn_KCnoe4oJQ0W-8cJ5wQ5RPH4dH_3cVzsWXLwEHI3UtOHVz_s21IOc8fLZzzkaIqqjwlW8YtCoAZOvG8auZ1NdbB8BErz_swIxU5HF8_keM-_M9nBb4OBN81k-S0sYvjb0n02TP5VwRz02EjX4etBlfX3TY1EDH4pKUNXW1O1Et3gDvkUEX58Uy-7M_SwYJimuhrvckL1iNJYmUaxyCGuYC1Ae1vptv95sO8gCov4q_z0V6NlFguV2NW2wifSS4y_x233-HPUWRoLMg_ZjIz3eSQiuWlRp1Gz_yoKj4zH_ufQ--8qwrmfovF43JwU%3D)**

[**HELP ME RAISE $5,785 BY MIDNIGHT -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=70e2ebea57e5430089734261d02bc766&_e=L9bCm-xR86NIAAViIAz69jwklo8gE_hDzIO3K2TfNaRJ8TJ4NlIRpb7FrTgUFPsCCN0RCF03vKXy2ZUb_ynrkwVi1G8JczAjY3hNTYWpnbwDSnn_KCnoe4oJQ0W-8cJ5wQ5RPH4dH_3cVzsWXLwEHI3UtOHVz_s21IOc8fLZzzkaIqqjwlW8YtCoAZOvG8auZ1NdbB8BErz_swIxU5HF8yBXUSHvMnjk5crqk6eSYrsd22G4XXUQj427obGNf0joQebOv3LkV2-hZtKy7i7qi6ym43uFmYXD4gMwzoWHVTGbE7N3wth_bJ5Bv0eFI4xMdkxIC2UjB9h9yqnvHSLA8M6oSfAshTLkpszuQKzDQXg1PCYTdXbbBPYnZTDb9xDTMsNMDvug_PrIco2iWzoQtKVlFVIVbWQSL9NKM2BrAzo%3D)
The truth of the matter is that we will be good to no one If we’re not able to strategize with each other. We need a day where we have absolutely no distractions.

I’m absolutely committed to putting the nail in the coffin of the Democrats’ House majority. That's why I'm hopeful **[you’ll help us raise the money we need in order to take a day off to rest and plan our next move](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=70e2ebea57e5430089734261d02bc766&_e=L9bCm-xR86NIAAViIAz69jwklo8gE_hDzIO3K2TfNaRJ8TJ4NlIRpb7FrTgUFPsCCN0RCF03vKXy2ZUb_ynrkwVi1G8JczAjY3hNTYWpnbwDSnn_KCnoe4oJQ0W-8cJ5wQ5RPH4dH_3cVzsWXLwEHI3UtOHVz_s21IOc8fLZzzkaIqqjwlW8YtCoAZOvG8auZ1NdbB8BErz_swIxU5HF802hT7KPtU0l68Pideql5gKBOVb-RENjZGN6w4nX_CpzCSDguiorzlygYCsj_Haqxc4Da44oPoPEEHeEix0Zq9--bZhVilApKmVSCsO1zmNRenJjyqKJPNNylbk13VtGJhZhu3KqyXj2pjPHNZEkJl5I496tusqYAK1EUrDmacYaXuvU8vq4WWun3WKQa77wfMiwujHWj5bHdw86_K1OH1E%3D)**.

**This couldn't be more serious -- and the clock is literally ticking as you read this.**
We need Democrats to speak out RIGHT NOW and call on the Supreme Court to rely on precedent, defend reproductive rights, and uphold _Roe v. Wade_. **But your signature is missing, and our petition closes at 11:59 P.M. tonight!**

name: John Fetterman
subject: I know you get a lot of emails. But I hope you'll hear me out today about why organizing in all 67 PA counties is so important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Here's the truth about our strategy to win Pennsylvania.
#
Hey, Derek — it's John Fetterman.
I wanted to reach out, with just three days left in the month of November, to personally ask if you'd [** _consider chipping in your first $5 to our campaign to directly help fund our REALLY ambitious organizing plan for 2022._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37730?refcode=em20211127-3615&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3615%2E434096%2E-Mic7B)
I know you get a lot of emails from my team + me (and hell, we're all just now emerging from our turkey-comas. 😴) So I hope you'll hear me out about why this request is so important right now:
You see, the elections in Virginia and Pennsylvania at the beginning of this month proved that we simply can't afford to skimp on organizing everywhere.
In order to compete with Republicans in the midterms, we can't afford to get clobbered in the reddest areas of our Commonwealth and still expect elections to go our way.
I believe that, in order to truly earn every vote possible, we need to campaign everywhere — _urban, suburban, AND rural._
Nobody's vote should be taken for granted in this race, and nobody should be counted out simply because of where they live. I had the honor of serving as Mayor of a "forgotten" town for 13 years in Braddock. Those years of service only reaffirmed my belief that every town — and every person — in this Commonwealth deserve a fighting chance.
**Organizing and campaigning everywhere isn't just the "right" way to win this race. It's the ONLY way to win.**
But that's a lot easier said than done. In order to build a historic and unprecedented organizing program that's able to thoroughly reach and engage voters in every one of PA's 67 counties, we need a lot more funds in the door. And as we close in on the final month before 2022 officially begins, I am coming to you for your help to build the kind of campaign that can take on the GOP and _actually win._
[**_That's why I need to ask you today, with just three days left in the month to reach our goal: Will you please kick in your first $5 if you're ready to organize in all 67 of Pennsylvania's counties alongside me?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37730?refcode=em20211127-3615&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3615%2E434096%2E-Mic7B)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37730?refcode=em20211127-3615&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3615%2E434096%2E-Mic7B)**
I feel so incredibly lucky to have you on this team. None (and I really do mean _none_) of this would be possible without your support. 🙏
More soon,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211127-3615-footer&t=22&refcode2=3615_434096_-Mic7B&akid=3615%2E434096%2E-Mic7B)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=3615%2E434096%2E-Mic7B)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3615%2E434096%2E-Mic7B)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Hi Peter, we have an important request. Our first-ever end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up in three days, and we've set an ambitious goal to raise $25,000 over email this month. _But as it currently stands, we're less than 70% to goal with not much time to spare._ [**_If you are able, will you please chip in $3 or whatever you can afford? You'll be remembered as one of the first supporters of the Primary Sinema Project:_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSWmFgt_S5b9Q6eIY7BRaYaBjKiu1gwJ4Pq5CHvCqC9AWwClRqDJCqm_58UQ-ldED7C1C-oKQUatNtAnWF6e2qJvf_b3T0YfA5hPN8c-dZeriYpAA8ucBVvNnrOqZJFqh9PcNqccIGnMrX35ykTZfQuszcFFukvREcZ7cDF8NRs4jS8JBdgGJ76QTvvmozP-ZPtyjvbL-_-nUBz8ZznTd48tySkSJjR8K2GT5dXlLY0do-PiTfDT_XBIHOglICn2h1SEnBwnbxggsdV6KL-zZXpZjJg11dlaK1G2XNcaOCQWEx3RGHxCXQUJGYbwLuPelP/3hd/hpvzMtpbRNOUfv0mlOPY-A/h1/so9CyZYvHQ-qgvRI7XbRy5ESjV77oBM-D0HSVhJ7ZD0) **[Contribute $3 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSWmFgt_S5b9Q6eIY7BRaYaBjKiu1gwJ4Pq5CHvCqC9AWFYBr-HAnhTH5-ks0RemKH34nnxXMetwB9hVBtVULzrtFCsjGEiSxHq3FXVBuC3JrqHQy-VykLYaaOC_a05FDhleEUQ1aC0_s5ZMZPXV-gklIY1u9zmxkXSSaUYeDvVl2OD8Y6bwe0m6y7Vx9QVCKRrN1mroOv9l0I-0a6pyu7lWkoh1lt8rmOy4lr0kgjc8FDG5ADSos-MThCpWF79Ryy3O4RJQYWllf7iuUDIeMS3RSNzsXNsF_DybNSTZTa8ZmisiA70aZwsBwTAfrt3x0A/3hd/hpvzMtpbRNOUfv0mlOPY-A/h2/3eB92eE5i4VSyL-m3wHY3R5ydMXGt_81ak-Xk5-z8Uc)** Time and again, Kyrsten Sinema has proven that she doesn't have Arizonans' best interests at heart. Sinema continues to be the number-one obstacle holding up President Biden's agenda in the Senate. She has succeeded in stripping popular provisions in the Build Back Better Act. She wants to keep the filibuster, even if it means not passing voting rights. She prioritizes the needs of her corporate donors and their lobbyists rather than those of Arizonans. Thankfully, ever since we launched the Primary Sinema project, we've received an incredible response. We're energized by all the Arizonans and folks across the country who are ready to join us to beat Kyrsten Sinema. But if we want to beat Sinema and ensure that Democrats can hold onto the Senate (and the Senate seats in our state!) — **we must continue our work to build a big, diverse movement on the ground.** [**_So, Peter, what do you say? Can we count on you to chip in $3 to our movement and help us reach our $25,000 email fundraising goal before our first end-of-month fundraising deadline?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSWmFgt_S5b9Q6eIY7BRaYaBjKiu1gwJ4Pq5CHvCqC9AVWYaGU7Zebzw7gUga9TbFH2UH__MFbXU6nekth8mNdbZKUev2lVKkrt81ncUYAqtuVDfr1yIFD1jLBKJKy1R00Ou-0NR4bxMz1CFDPgsWZw40jty4Ic7f304X-Tgemrwy13yrBYwMviBSyW0PU4SO2GC5L0OjTjhDMm4Dhxv_aHobh6cysowUWGI7DbUd-oGw0uWJahg-gMVz8B57FxyEWNarTSu1111_HTduxrFFavMhoXGG0Em_jwXvdy_TxHqV9eSaLzunKCANRuubYtqV8/3hd/hpvzMtpbRNOUfv0mlOPY-A/h3/D6fLKjeUcsIEQjUNIw8ONNzj6GmXtp35-QIyyH2K5gU) 100% of your donation will go towards fueling the work of grassroots organizations on the ground, right here in Arizona, laying the foundation to primary Kyrsten Sinema: [Contribute $3 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSWmFgt_S5b9Q6eIY7BRaYaKFD7a8udE1aF8rjhMMEqc6Wo-cu37JcRyVJwTZC0z4-EGb0s1M-0wlfvYtFPtmdHg_84bM4QZ2XsbmGKLCy--wuDAKZtWoczhBwz0J0zNlk7u9NLKEryc7tIBcBm8vvsh_jf6Yz-O-YpQrJTrX81KKBJDzdyhTHNqLCv6xcpodgpHgBuCsUtSOigSGhcf1ObiO7ka1gFUNRjAFLmgElaIzX99NntCLWkAzlowXLdTj1_f6Mcxxfol_TcIWk4OtA3yiDr1HhfRZk8fSBgR3HIRdnkdn8BagAtqrNC951XEag/3hd/hpvzMtpbRNOUfv0mlOPY-A/h4/VPLDzKJTbt4qm9BXsr2D0dHAsYBZL-eYX3misEYiyUg) The support we've received so far from folks like you has set our movement up for success, and it really makes a huge impact on what we're able to do. clean_body: If we want to beat Sinema, we must continue our work to build a big, diverse movement on the ground. | | | Hi Peter, we have an important request. Our first-ever end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up in three days, and we've set an ambitious goal to raise $25,000 over email this month. But as it currently stands, we're less than 70% to goal with not much time to spare. Time and again, Kyrsten Sinema has proven that she doesn't have Arizonans' best interests at heart. Sinema continues to be the number-one obstacle holding up President Biden's agenda in the Senate. She has succeeded in stripping popular provisions in the Build Back Better Act. She wants to keep the filibuster, even if it means not passing voting rights. She prioritizes the needs of her corporate donors and their lobbyists rather than those of Arizonans. Thankfully, ever since we launched the Primary Sinema project, we've received an incredible response. We're energized by all the Arizonans and folks across the country who are ready to join us to beat Kyrsten Sinema. But if we want to beat Sinema and ensure that Democrats can hold onto the Senate (and the Senate seats in our state!) — we must continue our work to build a big, diverse movement on the ground. 100% of your donation will go towards fueling the work of grassroots organizations on the ground, right here in Arizona, laying the foundation to primary Kyrsten Sinema: The support we've received so far from folks like you has set our movement up for success, and it really makes a huge impact on what we're able to do. Thank you. With gratitude, The Primary Sinema team | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. subject: update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
We have a unique opportunity and advantage that we must harness ...
| | |
---
**Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) recently announced he's running for reelection and was endorsed by Donald Trump at a rally here in Iowa. I fully intend to defeat him and flip Iowa blue, Peter – but I need you with me. Here's the latest:**
**First** , the momentum is on _our_ side. Nearly two-thirds of Iowa voters _don't_ want to reelect Sen. Grassley, which means we have a unique opportunity and advantage that we must harness to flip this Senate seat blue.
**But** defeating Sen. Grassley – in what the Des Moines Register is calling a "marquee matchup" – will come down to resources, and the campaign arm of the Senate Republicans has already hauled in $76 million this year. They are well equipped to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley and attack competitive challengers like me.
**So right now,** ahead of our end-of-month fundraising deadline, my team and I need to raise $50,000. This is a grassroots campaign, and hitting these goals and building up resources is how we will flip Iowa blue.

name: John Castorani
subject: Our numbers are pretty sluggish this month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
Coming up short of hitting our financial goals is going to force us to make some tough decisions if things don’t pick up Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=208bad0c11b444119f45cdb7365bd005&_t=yUE9Br4tCb2vlovgXS8hCt6swMRwXS62P6vlsmAZ61vpYv471Bb9yFAgYbUBJmd_vOE4fyywGMypd_s_Qc3bkHkYc2J0K0OsRgc1VBS688UT115h19DDaQMvzJfvAkIzez7Kolwf5Bhr02RrTPB21qg_SSa80S0W7zDO6y5Z2b0%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=208bad0c11b444119f45cdb7365bd005&_e=U5wYN81mpR_BmkrWRM7LGy9P3nTyzQInGUSQCj7ZdfEiAvSkAUWBVvZ35f_36jBticfZaQm4ceII3X9X17yevO8enNKvGDVNPJ4oGNy9tCY8ZeBhb7SzERyS2hLOsegNzteGJx9wwqUyVty1jL59X6Zx_u-dYJEtm7nKmdYbBE3vyAO3u5PTVtXTKCemp6XuWp3B94OQj32OXLrZOaIAhr8lk5Cfbj70uoZljoz5HjKvgMOXc2vs1S6tD-Hrd3NdhKRusseA8aAMNankwBLdyMfcxGQjsyI12d95rX-rF6oJ1IDPE6AVDqoFlHsOOVg3kvZQ5IGHvxiZ2oL0r6GI5UpI0jfssA_Nu_fnU0fX3ID8x35Qwzyy1YDo3YbySvIfDRqlQETPp2g9hC6gIvga3eshgKPIqKyu7_TPci147PiaeP_ejFpCWO7-lcMTS8Znv3Mb6RJFqgxvlqnQNbIo9bsHTty7pb2bIl-nfpiPnig%3D)
---

I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving, Fellow Conservative. While the left continues to try and find reasons to scare the half of the country into sacrificing their liberties in the name of public health, it was nice to see that they didn’t succeed this past week. For that, I am so thankful.

I’m thankful for the opportunity to run to represent my fellow citizens in the United States House.

**I’m thankful to be in touch with you**. If you’ve made a contribution to my campaign in the past 7 months, thank you. If you’ve yet to take the plunge, **[there is no better time than today.](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=208bad0c11b444119f45cdb7365bd005&_e=U5wYN81mpR_BmkrWRM7LGy9P3nTyzQInGUSQCj7ZdfEiAvSkAUWBVvZ35f_36jBticfZaQm4ceII3X9X17yevO8enNKvGDVNPJ4oGNy9tCY8ZeBhb7SzERyS2hLOsegNzteGJx9wwqUyVty1jL59X6Zx_u-dYJEtm7nKmdYbBE3vyAO3u5PTVtXTKCemp6XuWp3B94OQj32OXLrZOaIAhr8lk5Cfbj70uoZljoz5HjKvgMOXc2vs1S6tD-Hrd3NdhKRusseA8aAMNankwBLdyFixpVV54gzFEfNggs8qkariAZ9kxBqtkSsamgQWRbVQQL8IjtqfYq7xuJLHcBhIkC_u6KZMGUeJcuRfRTrIbehVWLXN_empl2C_NtYwCKF_Yt-bwJ8KSDu0euSnX9eL7TKWRNFEo8SHr5fVs-mMldlcUh4yPGnlPYaiXWHkY8T6A63cmWQRsu2c7Suv9hWtXUL1WWkfrX5NHWuEocnbnrI%3D)**

There is no better time to make a donation than today because we’re very behind where we need to be with only 3 days left in the month.

I’m about to do battle against some very seasoned politicians, **you might even say career politicians** , so coming up short of hitting our financial goals is going to force us to make some tough decisions if things don’t pick up.

I don’t have the field to myself anymore and cannot appear to be losing momentum. And while I know that the last thing you’re thinking about two days after thanksgiving is whether or not to make a political donation, **[I’m hoping I’ve caught you at the right time today and you’ll consider a small gift to help ensure I reach my goal of raising another $2,000 by midnight tonight.](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=208bad0c11b444119f45cdb7365bd005&_e=U5wYN81mpR_BmkrWRM7LGy9P3nTyzQInGUSQCj7ZdfEiAvSkAUWBVvZ35f_36jBticfZaQm4ceII3X9X17yevO8enNKvGDVNPJ4oGNy9tCY8ZeBhb7SzERyS2hLOsegNzteGJx9wwqUyVty1jL59X6Zx_u-dYJEtm7nKmdYbBE3vyAO3u5PTVtXTKCemp6XuWp3B94OQj32OXLrZOaIAhr8lk5Cfbj70uoZljoz5HjKvgMOXc2vs1S6tD-Hrd3NdhKRusseA8aAMNankwBLdyCzizFLIEPlrKeR3lNlbR4V3buJDzZHGszyYh75ujss_ek7mKKk3twVDqmShHQ5WgzMfoLb6zEDf_MD-6CiJ5WoXidxGOh_5E5F9l05XTucjWIMAkeQVkdiHp5dzhm0IYWIoTp-_ybPDVN7dpZdCmfMeCxbFifZu5FTv4ZrkTtaI2cB9NrTEz_34Ku48ni3IPC932c5Keh-Jme-xg44DDps%3D)**

| [**HELP ME HIT MY NOVEMBER GOAL** **› › **](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=208bad0c11b444119f45cdb7365bd005&_e=U5wYN81mpR_BmkrWRM7LGy9P3nTyzQInGUSQCj7ZdfEiAvSkAUWBVvZ35f_36jBticfZaQm4ceII3X9X17yevO8enNKvGDVNPJ4oGNy9tCY8ZeBhb7SzERyS2hLOsegNzteGJx9wwqUyVty1jL59X6Zx_u-dYJEtm7nKmdYbBE3vyAO3u5PTVtXTKCemp6XuWp3B94OQj32OXLrZOaIAhr8lk5Cfbj70uoZljoz5HjKvgMOXc2vs1S6tD-Hrd3NdhKRusseA8aAMNankwBLdyK6bF1DBwBvY9bgqkiN5JvwtIYzxFLzJ4lhotEQxRUsA4h8A2i6si9g003BIDeHsVE3E4gn0T6yP5taOUilHIZuPBWhouM5Zk5NgAzwWa6qZUrrpk5KQAuQgahKuGIOzdCpggzgQWArnC9AgQ0xUfJVMvRcw4cs1lj8RjM8CRDc0Zl8U8rq-Moh1FrUOx0GliDrtGyz9Ua5tVgFwsd2ZM9E%3D)
---

Since I wrote to you last the race in this battleground district got incrementally harder: I have several more opponent in the Republican Primary to compete with for the nomination to represent VA-07 in the House. clean_body: Coming up short of hitting our financial goals is going to force us to make some tough decisions if things don’t pick up Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving, Fellow Conservative. While the left continues to try and find reasons to scare the half of the country into sacrificing their liberties in the name of public health, it was nice to see that they didn’t succeed this past week. For that, I am so thankful. I’m thankful for the opportunity to run to represent my fellow citizens in the United States House. I’m thankful to be in touch with you. If you’ve made a contribution to my campaign in the past 7 months, thank you. If you’ve yet to take the plunge, There is no better time to make a donation than today because we’re very behind where we need to be with only 3 days left in the month. I’m about to do battle against some very seasoned politicians, you might even say career politicians , so coming up short of hitting our financial goals is going to force us to make some tough decisions if things don’t pick up. I don’t have the field to myself anymore and cannot appear to be losing momentum. And while I know that the last thing you’re thinking about two days after thanksgiving is whether or not to make a political donation, | Since I wrote to you last the race in this battleground district got incrementally harder: I have several more opponent in the Republican Primary to compete with for the nomination to represent VA-07 in the House. | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | Thank you for being with Team Castorani from the beginning. I owe our success to conservatives like you. In service John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 | Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia

I hope you had a great Thanksgiving with your loved ones! I’ll keep this short because it’s the weekend, and I’ve got football to watch with my kids: **My finance guru Aarica just told me we’re still about 265 donations short of our 500 donation goal before the end of the month.** [**Can you help fuel our movement to shake up the status quo by making one of those 265 donations right now? I’ll keep this short because it’s the weekend, and I’ve got football to watch with my kids: My finance guru Aarica just told me we’re still about 265 donations short of our 500 donation goal before the end of the month. I know you hear about fundraising from us a lot, but it’s because unlike Jim Cooper, I won’t take a dime from corporate PACs. name: Matt Gaetz (R-FL)
subject: MUST SEE: The DOJ is the greatest domestic threat to America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sBZa77EWUcUCPst5dLKf2Pw4LaxWzOydmDP7rcQExrifRzmGBAi-NbG2Bd6x9DmXZq8l0iz12XG67cSyAWF07WFpzXj0I4Gas8LTb8kuk64bvGLh2zLG3e67_exOXN-AKIA7tBtWFRr08Cel6kWBixOBosRz5AnRVmQEgTkQ4Bhj7O1gS8APlg==&c=Ny_lzXeQ6R8eGfRkQdnWYcDzZhN6GArZ2O8oxFmtubxMvOrgPTaM1A==&ch=lUrvPmsxuc4eHxIcO2Ih_1SZ0SASAEO8YXNN3DwgNMMhA8WIgBryoA==)
---
| Peter,
---
| Last Friday, we conservatives (and decent people everywhere) breathed a sigh of relief after Kyle Rittenhouse was found not guilty on all charges.
It was the right decision by the jury, but even so, Kyle should have never been put through that experience in the first place. It's clear he was targeted for his political beliefs and, yes, even his skin color.
The President of the United States, Democrat members of Congress, and countless leftwing media pundits have all called Kyle a white supremacist, even after he was found "not guilty" by a jury of his peers.
Now, Jerry Nadler, the head of the Judiciary Committee, has called for a DOJ investigation into the case. That's right, the left is once again using the nation's law enforcement to go after a political enemy and torment an innocent man.
---
| | | [STOP THE THREATS AGAINST CONSERVATIVES](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sBZa77EWUcUCPst5dLKf2Pw4LaxWzOydmDP7rcQExrifRzmGBAi-NbG2Bd6x9DmXZq8l0iz12XG67cSyAWF07WFpzXj0I4Gas8LTb8kuk64bvGLh2zLG3e67_exOXN-AKIA7tBtWFRr08Cel6kWBixOBosRz5AnRVmQEgTkQ4Bhj7O1gS8APlg==&c=Ny_lzXeQ6R8eGfRkQdnWYcDzZhN6GArZ2O8oxFmtubxMvOrgPTaM1A==&ch=lUrvPmsxuc4eHxIcO2Ih_1SZ0SASAEO8YXNN3DwgNMMhA8WIgBryoA==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sBZa77EWUcUCPst5dLKf2Pw4LaxWzOydmDP7rcQExrifRzmGBAi-NbG2Bd6x9DmXZq8l0iz12XG67cSyAWF07WFpzXj0I4Gas8LTb8kuk64bvGLh2zLG3e67_exOXN-AKIA7tBtWFRr08Cel6kWBixOBosRz5AnRVmQEgTkQ4Bhj7O1gS8APlg==&c=Ny_lzXeQ6R8eGfRkQdnWYcDzZhN6GArZ2O8oxFmtubxMvOrgPTaM1A==&ch=lUrvPmsxuc4eHxIcO2Ih_1SZ0SASAEO8YXNN3DwgNMMhA8WIgBryoA==)

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, | Last Friday, we conservatives (and decent people everywhere) breathed a sigh of relief after Kyle Rittenhouse was found not guilty on all charges. It was the right decision by the jury, but even so, Kyle should have never been put through that experience in the first place. It's clear he was targeted for his political beliefs and, yes, even his skin color. The President of the United States, Democrat members of Congress, and countless leftwing media pundits have all called Kyle a white supremacist, even after he was found "not guilty" by a jury of his peers. Now, Jerry Nadler, the head of the Judiciary Committee, has called for a DOJ investigation into the case. That's right, the left is once again using the nation's law enforcement to go after a political enemy and torment an innocent man. | | | == | == | We need to stand united and recognize that the left's tactic of punishing their political opponents using the Department of Justice is our greatest domestic threat. If you're ready to join me in this fight, == | | | == | Thanks for joining me, Matt Gaetz Republican, Florida's 1st District | == | | | | | | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2021 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. body:
The price tag to secure Wisconsin’s elections.
| Friend,
---
I just received the first bill for our lawsuit...
---
The costs of suing the Wisconsin Elections Commission to ensure future elections are free and fair are significant -- nearly $50,000! But like you, I believe no price tag is too high when it comes to protecting the integrity of our elections.
---
_Now more than ever, I’m counting on your sustained support to help us cover the** _$50,000 legal bill_** we’ve incurred for our ensuing legal battle against the Elections Commission. _
---

clean_body: The price tag to secure Wisconsin’s elections. | Friend, I just received the first bill for our lawsuit... The costs of suing the Wisconsin Elections Commission to ensure future elections are free and fair are significant -- nearly $50,000! But like you, I believe no price tag is too high when it comes to protecting the integrity of our elections. Now more than ever, I’m counting on your sustained support to help us cover the $50,000 legal bill we’ve incurred for our ensuing legal battle against the Elections Commission. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Date: Mon, Nov 15, 2021 Subject: BREAKING: LAWSUIT To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, After a non-partisan audit of the Wisconsin Elections Commission (WEC) identified numerous instances of the Commission issuing unlawful guidance on the 2020 election, I knew we couldn’t wait to act. That’s why I’m SUING the WEC to ensure our elections are FREE and FAIR with less than 1 year to go until Election Day. But I’m counting on our grassroots supporters like YOU to help me marshal the resources to win this fight in the courts. If we don’t secure Wisconsin’s elections ahead of this MUST-WIN governor’s race, 2022 will be nothing more than a repeat of 2020. We cannot wait until the eve of next year’s election to address the WEC’s failure and willful neglect of the law. Which is exactly why I’m asking the state Supreme court to immediately SUSPEND the unlawful guidance the WEC issued on the 2020 election. Our lawsuit is focusing on 3 key areas where the WEC failed to follow the law in its guidance: 1\. Allowing municipalities to establish unattended absentee ballot drop boxes 2\. Banning special voting deputies from long term care facilities 3\. Relocating and closing polling places on the eve of an election There’s too much at stake for us to lose this battle in the courts, Friend. Our freedom, our way of life, and the future of our great nation all depend on free and fair elections -- elections where every voter can trust the process and the result. Now more than ever, I need you fighting by my side to ensure our elections are free and fair. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

Hey Peter -- it's Marco coming to you with three facts you NEED to be aware of right now! [**Can you read these over then help me out with something before our End-of-Month deadline?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e526d313d70f4fd0814c7a7603f090c5&_e=BZ1b7ic5F4XJUI15QWgr8RfjPn982ddv2B_RC4yw8VXdWduCeM6ZRqk4LQiOuFMy1ppiEkKpNSXnrqtdQmMeKDTpBa20QunZT3lAG1b05pvRdKcHanCr60HNUoHEERyOrE9m_wDpHhEx9xvIQU__LMZ-F5l-h1zbCFCANWdGmgebiZAHKpeSE-_WCRI8nf680cdHHZpifiwrC3ilMkmH_gTflX-R2WprLNNtMXb1lhudUiFLG8dP7fOiNyKjT5iLvmiMALdNeMOa3LYuCa1ItHKAZXiEi1gmTi0MyL-gwU-TgdeLqcPfWRxkP7MkVfIH0hghQm_H7UiOkfK5ft9sK7f-55qaZMiJGYqpgHuSsJd2aMi8QGB0BsaLh_Kpa1HRGJ8CuPoLYeSdMvQtGdKnATOg41SwvC0g68B1mfmTchG3VE_9nKEn6pD7KnscLs3Mvq7IIAisRmYmkrB8tc2oAQEAK_HZmxLqNTcq-IZ3lZY5X_PD8geVVPAoQDqqngKw3Ncjx0i4GqXEsosSjdQANg%3D%3D)
**FACT #1:** If we lose Florida, we lose everything: the House, Senate, and White House.
**FACT #2:** 1 Senate seat and 5 House seats are the only thing separating us from complete Conservative control of Congress.
**FACT #3:** My Liberal opponent (the architect behind TRUMP'S IMPEACHMENT) just raked in $4.6 MILLION... and her fellow Democrats are raking in millions more!
_Listen, I need your help. Badly._
[**Our biggest deadline yet is closing in and we still need just 523 more Patriots to help Republicans across the finish line. We 're already falling behind and this is our only chance of catching up.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e526d313d70f4fd0814c7a7603f090c5&_e=BZ1b7ic5F4XJUI15QWgr8RfjPn982ddv2B_RC4yw8VXdWduCeM6ZRqk4LQiOuFMy1ppiEkKpNSXnrqtdQmMeKDTpBa20QunZT3lAG1b05pvRdKcHanCr60HNUoHEERyOrE9m_wDpHhEx9xvIQU__LMZ-F5l-h1zbCFCANWdGmgebiZAHKpeSE-_WCRI8nf680cdHHZpifiwrC3ilMkmH_gTflX-R2WprLNNtMXb1lhudUiFLG8dP7fOiNyKjT5iLvmiMALdNeMOa3LYuCa1ItHKAZXiEi1gmTi0MyL-gwU-TgdeLqcPfWRxkP7MkVfIH6V-bsmxBD1rsvcJD2vMSfpRTySogh8qouQK3Ejetf7x2ZtomZGoDV9JszyEcyn-iv3f_vjchDGGwlgo0FXmu4_jVwSxfAxxHT2788XSb5qL-boWmD-aMJhGM4ZQr689nWO4gZZK_aavvqy7hje09c1KiaHPOi05B-Vfvne0p-ySfvJX4Pn9ldgeb8d30jzV0636AvbWviO2VcSwRo1kucA%3D%3D)
I'm not asking for much. Even a small contribution can make a huge impact when only a few seats make all the difference.
**This is our biggest test of the year and we all know what is on the line -- the future of this country.**
Can you help while there's still time?
Thank you,
Marco Rubio

name: Team Kina
subject: BP, Walmart & McDonalds
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
That’s who Rep Danny Davis is calling for support | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8s37-E21h0ktcBS8MHEaK64qwHgbpnyK-aNFliWrfMk8wKEaBsWC3al9k0woQxSj-f_TALTbCSrt6ieY7Kvda32qBef3H3y4C9Q-MriTebvVFYZKBKsD_PNLn2HlWqqJAIQcd1IMVgLxr5Iep1-AsScG7motAWMea6FKf1xTLYT-WF074ev29S2pv1A0Flj-l2gpDa9qrlYda_q1tstV575w/3hd/1QJMa4q4QuGKuiZm7_xXzw/h0/DRr0MORyPPTZ1w3pLZBdD7NhNhDjXIaeo0SNGzVDgec) Dear Team, Our district is filled with small business owners. People who are building a life for themselves and their families, while engaging in their community. They know that their businesses are only as strong as the people who surround them. Kina spends hours every week engaging with community members and understanding the ways we can support their work. If you look at Rep Danny Davis’s FEC filing from this time last cycle, you can see that he makes a different kind of phone call. Here are some highlights of the corporations he called for support and donations: **BP CORPORATION NORTH AMERICA INC.
WALMART INC.
MCDONALD'S CORPORATION

| | | The minimum wage has lost 21% of its value since Congress last raised it 12 years ago.
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkzwG6Xmtb75Ut3vFHKuVDvoU4L16TB-iK6qV35enQneyoac-3wlk6xsoUuLvYI2nFOvZsYLsHFwUIjJX9VAIwrHX0-1N8FGOO4oaj5tq24nhfUPg6B0ih_Dw7cCwTSl-bqYsb3S3KT9qk8PdMo5MSnQia9XiomeGpVqjWbI55Zz04R9QZ6GRSFDhuROVwNOH2l81Fn5KMidaTzeU-IsJnfj_40HQfD7mIN9ed0KyPsTwna82lKchKp8L3tZfF6ugR44ui7MdMOKq5uR9AyUwM24GoKOir1GUzhkGZDyi90lMyON0hPcq_KUcKu2JxXvxLpCcyIKkIZQBcgGDhotpPlKlAQbw05r9LpezLKid8RLE2NueJy0H1YoPgBToG6YUCmOiEsYLJ2yDnCkO0mcF9de1a1PKS0LJmcR-ZQiL4yY0M6ifJemRVIA8hBECTAeVvyr6pk8bqUSnV82Nwl9o2hPXlneg4P5x5Yc0NIin37pH6J0XG8SK_WhcYOc-nljOXbUBkZEgxWVSxKcUBrVJC1/3hd/9vjGauSQTIeHoGSaLJEVZQ/h0/5NmpPfp7rLOXNBhZQY2pruA6XyWqu_Jyg08AJvt6j2k)[**Everyone deserves a living wage. Demand Congress raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkzwG6Xmtb75Ut3vFHKuVDvoU4L16TB-iK6qV35enQneyoac-3wlk6xsoUuLvYI2nFOvZsYLsHFwUIjJX9VAIwrHX0-1N8FGOO4oaj5tq24nhfUPg6B0ih_Dw7cCwTSl-bqYsb3S3KT9qk8PdMo5MSnQia9XiomeGpVqjWbI55Zz04R9QZ6GRSFDhuROVwNOH2l81Fn5KMidaTzeU-IsJnfj_40HQfD7mIN9ed0KyPsTwna82lKchKp8L3tZfF6ugR44ui7MdMOKq5uR9AyUwM24GoKOir1GUzhkGZDyi90lMyON0hPcq_KUcKu2JxXvxLAhQzSCyZXYTa1vZrD4aQ8nK79KdeDNZSnVWYYQCC1hINC-T3tIut6h67fmGyrTIVyldEUi7rOIbCw0zXTG7qApdN9bebBpVll3po71-QOQ41jW39rE9hAi1w_6H-dSixiy3m1Oz76N8iv0QpbKiH1JIgwAHCgwGRglELF2dcfAQM5oXIPBBx3pKfFXIfn2iVi14n-RmJwqNDUhHgvsHt2/3hd/9vjGauSQTIeHoGSaLJEVZQ/h1/RmbtwVh34GXu4C7GT583lTeejnIv2Yyn5fz6ZLucrQ4)
There’s nowhere in America where the $7.25 per hour minimum wage, a mere $15,000 annually for a full-time job, can be considered a liveable wage.
While billionaires make record gains in their wealth, workers on the federal minimum wage haven’t had a raise since 2009, losing 21% of their purchasing power to inflation and the rising cost of living.
**In Congress, Melanie D’Arrigo will demand a fair, livable wage for everyone.**
**[Sign the petition and tell Congress to raise the minimum wage now!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkzwG6Xmtb75Ut3vFHKuVDvoU4L16TB-iK6qV35enQneyoac-3wlk6xsoUuLvYI2nFOvZsYLsHFwUIjJX9VAIwrHX0-1N8FGOO4oaj5tq24nhfUPg6B0ih_Dw7cCwTSl-bqYsb3S3KT9qk8PdMo5MSnQia9XiomeGpVqjWbI55Zz04R9QZ6GRSFDhuROVwNOH2l81Fn5KMidaTzeU-IsJnfj_40HQfD7mIN9ed0KyPsTwna82lKchKp8L3tZfF6ugR44ui7MdMOKq5uR9AyUwM24GoKOir1GUzhkGZDyi90lMyON0hPcq_KUcKu2JxXvxKbx4r9WNf9F2JWYZt_pgNhyJD6O8MvWpXmazymahAqNLj4piuSUzWJnQFNS9J4gBGFYvnahpu2ZI7Uln0OY1CAnvv9VVZvz-JdMOtlqg2EMKeNjr9yjmk2n_O9UUxW2cP4wmKjzMHNP_ZOgbD91Y5gx7fdjDBXQFxATVR-HdDNU93YbL9g4TONmYc5hhTSYtfjr2Bf7h4eKRl2P91AFpWu/3hd/9vjGauSQTIeHoGSaLJEVZQ/h2/1Je7OAzhDMDIa4579zJn9Q0ji8TsaMP2XYhMUNHdaT0)**
American taxpayers spend over $150 _billion_ a year subsidizing companies like Wal-Mart and McDonalds so they can continue paying their employees poverty wages.
Big corporations are padding their profits while we foot the bill for the government benefits low-wage workers rely on to afford the bare necessities for their families.
**An equitable economy is built from the worker, up, not the billionaires down.**
**[Sign the petition and tell Congress to raise the minimum wage now!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkzwG6Xmtb75Ut3vFHKuVDvoU4L16TB-iK6qV35enQneyoac-3wlk6xsoUuLvYI2nFOvZsYLsHFwUIjJX9VAIwrHX0-1N8FGOO4oaj5tq24nhfUPg6B0ih_Dw7cCwTSl-bqYsb3S3KT9qk8PdMo5MSnQia9XiomeGpVqjWbI55Zz04R9QZ6GRSFDhuROVwNOH2l81Fn5KMidaTzeU-IsJnfj_40HQfD7mIN9ed0KyPsTwna82lKchKp8L3tZfF6ugR44ui7MdMOKq5uR9AyUwM24GoKOir1GUzhkGZDyi90lMyON0hPcq_KUcKu2JxXvxLAizmGHwOnuTzZVifgBH-ybucgnvPw00A8QlPuacOO4zeqxqI0X_mNjJNqEjrXe84klJ5dt5jZNr4xZITz62G_WQoUSMOX_PtOAQiCmYaPCSUUMEmdW7lyfg0SGrnLl-3gRlB2d8AeBZBOT2h6Z-QmJrvSrk9BAK98FFv8CcGA_xczK4rSo9xWrXdeA8_HlqoTqEWHIXPyte0YNP-Em8XQ/3hd/9vjGauSQTIeHoGSaLJEVZQ/h3/3K149GPE66uLoWkJwjirOKbAz94vLKbIDk5rk5UjXms)**
Thanks for taking action today.
\-- D’Arrigo for Congress

name: Tim Ryan
subject: The Big Game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1560%2E3611125%2EfyanVw ][IMG]

Hey folks, I’ve only got a few minutes before kickoff, so I’ve
got to make this quick.

At noon today, my Ohio State Buckeyes will take on “that team up north” in
the biggest game of the year.

A campaign has more in common with football than you might think. There
are odds-on favorites and there are underdogs -- but no matter what the
oddsmakers say, you still have to go out there and play the game.

And when you do, anything can happen.

Look, I know we’re the underdogs in this Senate race. We’re stepping out
onto the field against special interests and billionaires ready to play
dirty. They’ve got virtually unlimited resources to use against us.

But I’d bet everything I have on this team. Together, I know we can
overcome everything and anything the GOP throws our way -- but only if
you’re with us. Let’s leave everything on the field and show them what a
grassroots team can do.

I believe in our Buckeyes almost as much as I believe in this team. If
you’re ready to win the fight of our lives -- [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6181?t=1007&akid=1560%2E3611125%2EfyanVw ]help power our campaign
until the last whistle blows by making a donation right now. Anything you
give will help us reach our end-of-month goal.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6181?t=1008&akid=1560%2E3611125%2EfyanVw ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6182?t=1009&akid=1560%2E3611125%2EfyanVw ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6183?t=1010&akid=1560%2E3611125%2EfyanVw ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6184?t=1011&akid=1560%2E3611125%2EfyanVw ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6185?t=1012&akid=1560%2E3611125%2EfyanVw ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6186?t=1013&akid=1560%2E3611125%2EfyanVw ]Other Amount

I will fight for Ohio until the clock reads zero, and I’m glad I’ve got
you by my side.

O H -- I O!

Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6181?t=1014&akid=1560%2E3611125%2EfyanVw ]Tim in OSU gear

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1560%2E3611125%2EfyanVw ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=1560%2E3611125%2EfyanVw ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=1560%2E3611125%2EfyanVw ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1005&akid=1560%2E3611125%2EfyanVw ]Donate Once

Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1006&akid=1560%2E3611125%2EfyanVw ][IMG]

name: Katherine Fischer, Beto for Texas
subject: Bringing everyone in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Will you support our organizing work?
#
The only way we’re going to win this campaign is if we go everywhere and bring everyone in.
It’s going to take meeting folks where they are and listening to them about the challenges that keep them up at night, and the opportunities they aspire to achieve. It’ll take hosting events, big and small, where people have the opportunity to listen to each other and find common ground on the issues that matter most.
And it’s going to take knocking on every door and reminding every Texan why these elections matter. Too many Texans will tell you that they’re tired of seeing nothing change — year after year and election after election. After decades of voter suppression, disenfranchisement, and being made to feel like their vote won’t make a difference, it’s up to us to partner with Texans to give them a reason to believe in change.
It isn’t going to be easy, but there’s nothing more important that we could be doing right now.
[Will you consider giving $3 or more right now to support our organizing work? Your support will help us host events, pay organizers to knock on doors, and put fuel in the truck to help us travel and connect with folks across the state. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50138?refcode=ema20211127-164409&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=164409%2E444211%2ECjGKuP)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50138?refcode=ema20211127-164409&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=164409%2E444211%2ECjGKuP)**
If there’s one thing Beto and our team have learned from our years of traveling the state and working with Texans to move our state forward, it’s that we’ve got to work together to get the big things done. It’s the only way we’re going to get past the extreme, divisive politics that we see in Texas today, and get back to the big, bold vision that used to define Texas.
[A contribution of just $3 will support our effort to make this a campaign of, by, and for the people of Texas. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50138?refcode=ema20211127-164409&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=164409%2E444211%2ECjGKuP)
Let’s keep the faith!
Katherine Fischer
Organizing Director, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211127-164409-footer&t=22&refcode2=164409_444211_CjGKuP&akid=164409%2E444211%2ECjGKuP)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=164409%2E444211%2ECjGKuP)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=164409%2E444211%2ECjGKuP)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: "Normal"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Corporate Dems listen to corporate lobbyists instead of the people. That’s
the core of the problem, no matter how much establishment Democrats try to
blame progressives for their election losses. Progressives bucking the
status quo to advocate for strong transformative policies is the SOLUTION.

Yet, after corporate Democrats lost the Virginia Governor’s race, centrist
Democrat Abigail Spanberger said what her corporate donors wanted to hear:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84570?refcode=em20211127-20656&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=20656%2E1203867%2EkKBgT- ]Tweet from reporter Kaitlan Collins reads Nobody elected him to be
F.D.R., they elected him to be normal and stop the chaos,' Rep. Abigail
Spanberger, a Virginia Democrat, said regarding the Biden agenda.

Just 2 weeks later, GOP House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy echoed
Spanberger’s comment in his 8 hour speech delaying the Build Back Better
Act vote.

The political establishment would be fine with “normal” and “stopping the
chaos.” But for most people in this country — struggling to afford health
care, pay back their student loans, feeling the impacts of the climate
crisis, worrying about paying their rent and utilities — “normal” is not
enough. We need more.

That’s why we need to elect more Justice Democrats to Congress. Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez, Rashida Tlaib, Cori Bush, and our other Justice Dems in
Congress are the ones (often the only ones) fighting for progressive
policies. Corporate Dems, the GOP, and the status quo of serving corporate
interests isn’t going to cut it.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84570?refcode=em20211127-20656&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=20656%2E1203867%2EkKBgT- ]Can you chip in your
first $3 to grow our movement and elect
more Justice Democrats to Congress? We must show the strength of
progressives right now, as the onslaught of smears from corporate
Democrats and the GOP will only get worse as the 2022 primary season gets
underway.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84570?refcode=em20211127-20656&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=20656%2E1203867%2EkKBgT- ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=20656%2E1203867%2EkKBgT- ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=20656%2E1203867%2EkKBgT- ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211127-20656-footer&t=1024&refcode2=20656_1203867_kKBgT-&akid=20656%2E1203867%2EkKBgT-

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=20656%2E1203867%2EkKBgT-

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Tobias Read
subject: Supporting main street
body:
We're out in Beaverton today supporting our local small business owners for Small Business Saturday.
---
| | Peter,

We're out in Beaverton today supporting our local small business owners for Small Business Saturday. Things haven’t been easy for the hard working people who keep our main street economy running, and I’m proud to put my money where my mouth is by supporting them today and every day. I speak with Oregon small business owners and employees all the time about what we can do in state government to support them. From retirement savings programs for their employees to training programs for our students, I’ll work every day as your Governor to support the local employers who are driving our economy.

Labor shortages, inflation driving up the price of goods, and rising rents continue to challenge our economy. Public safety and quality of life issues remain a serious concern for the business owners I speak with.

That’s why I’m making the choice to shop small this small business Saturday. Together, we can make the difference for our small businesses in every town and city in Oregon. **Will you join me today?**

Thank you,

---

---

name: Finance Team, Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate
subject: These are our 3 options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
We’re looking at our fundraising dashboard, and this is the situation.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211127-417-footer-ak&t=2&akid=417%2E90090%2EvyneZy)
As the month comes to a close, here on the finance team we’re taking a look at our November fundraising, and we wanted to show you what we’re seeing. Take a look at our dashboard:
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16145?t=3&akid=417%2E90090%2EvyneZy)
We’ve had a slowdown in digital fundraising the past few days, and it’s left us in a really tough spot for the campaign. We’re picking between some tough options right now:
1. Pull down our digital ads, meaning fewer people hear about Morgan’s campaign for Senate.
2. Have Morgan devote all her time to fundraising calls, taking her off the road and away from talking to voters.
3. Reach out to our grassroots supporters to help, **which is what we’re doing right now.**

**[Can you chip in $5 right now to help us catch up and continue running a strong, grassroots-powered campaign?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16145?t=4&akid=417%2E90090%2EvyneZy)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16151?refcode=em20211127-417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=417%2E90090%2EvyneZy)**
We’ve only been able to get this far as an outsider campaign fighting to change things because of the strength of our grassroots support. Unlike our opponent, Rep. Tim Ryan, we’re actually committed to fighting corruption and we don’t take any money from corporate PACs.
Morgan is the only candidate who can turn out folks who’ve been disillusioned by politics for years because her experiences and her track record prove that a better Ohio is possible. This campaign will only succeed with our supporters giving all they can to fuel our efforts.
**[If you’re with us, chip in $5 before midnight on November 30 to help us catch up and finish the month back on track.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16145?t=24&akid=417%2E90090%2EvyneZy)**
Thank you for your help — we mean it when we say this is all thanks to you.
Finance Team
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211127-417-footer&t=25&refcode2=417_90090_vyneZy&akid=417%2E90090%2EvyneZy)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=417%2E90090%2EvyneZy)

clean_body: We’re looking at our fundraising dashboard, and this is the situation. As the month comes to a close, here on the finance team we’re taking a look at our November fundraising, and we wanted to show you what we’re seeing. Take a look at our dashboard: We’ve had a slowdown in digital fundraising the past few days, and it’s left us in a really tough spot for the campaign. We’re picking between some tough options right now: 1. Pull down our digital ads, meaning fewer people hear about Morgan’s campaign for Senate. 2. Have Morgan devote all her time to fundraising calls, taking her off the road and away from talking to voters. 3. Reach out to our grassroots supporters to help, which is what we’re doing right now. We’ve only been able to get this far as an outsider campaign fighting to change things because of the strength of our grassroots support. Unlike our opponent, Rep. Tim Ryan, we’re actually committed to fighting corruption and we don’t take any money from corporate PACs. Morgan is the only candidate who can turn out folks who’ve been disillusioned by politics for years because her experiences and her track record prove that a better Ohio is possible. This campaign will only succeed with our supporters giving all they can to fuel our efforts. Thank you for your help — we mean it when we say this is all thanks to you. Finance Team Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate | | Email us: contact@morganharper.org

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

Hello,
**GOOD NEWS:** The latest polling from the gold standard Des Moines Register shows just 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Chuck Grassley next year, and Grassley’s approval ratings are the lowest they’ve EVER been!
**BAD NEWS:** Corporate PACs and special interests have given Grassley millions of dollars, and right now Democrat Admiral Mike Franken is falling short of his critical end-of-month goal with just 72 hours to go until the deadline.

body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/GRD0BZb-)

It's Nancy. I need your immediate attention.

**FIRST:** I watched Republicans shatter EIGHT fundraising records in a row.

**THEN:** I watched them unveil a gut-wrenching plan to defeat 70 of my most vulnerable Democrats.

****[NOW: I'm calling for your help to watch their plans completely BACKFIRE and hand these power-hungry Republicans a STUNNING rebuke.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_qfgbd~)****
| [END OF MONTH DEADLINE: 11/30, 11:59 P.M.
NAME:dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_zQVm-)

---

This is the most urgent request I've ever made of you.

House Republicans are on a fundraising hot streak to take our Majority right out from under us.

And if we don't respond in a BIG way -- and I mean SOON -- we could be powerless to stop them from barging back into power at this fragile moment for our democracy.

**That 's why I had no choice but to set an ambitious $300,000 End of Month goal for my House Democrats.** We can't afford to raise a penny less, or we might lose any hope of defending our Majority.

**[So I'm asking you directly: Can I count on your $3 before my deadline expires in just 72 hours to safeguard my House Democrats all across the country?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/d30Et6-)**
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Nancy

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Border Open: I’m Not Jokin’
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
The Classic Biden Fumble [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6519%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=vccym7rpRM7grV9iw7MA0g&sysid=1)
The Classic Biden Fumble

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67217%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Io91i8OVu%2f4zvC%2flsju9Tg&sysid=1)
---

Folks,

The Mighty Border Czar Kamala Harris has abandoned her post. By abandoned, I mean that she has barely even visited the border.
| [FIRE THE BORDER CZAR ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67218%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g62dRnNVkzUIrZEdEGQVsQ&sysid=1)
---

---

This administration is threatening the safety of Americans and essentially lighting their tax dollars on fire with a blow torch. First, they leave the border wide open for anyone to just walk on through, and then they promise a financial reward for coming here illegally?

**_Goodbye common sense, I see you have made a grand exit!_**
Folks, this is why I have decided I’m running for re-election. Clearly, Ole’ Joe Biden needs some accountability up in D.C. Let's bring back common sense, and fight for a Senate Majority to keep him in line!

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z8g5itvr6foo3kgjbv1bbl707fkta4d9994910p8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1im4oj6clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0k5oaor589g512aqbaqmbkjatmtdols2lrus7i8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1im4oj6clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5culfnb1nc03nod2vt5siqjp0kb8etk8bgpu3h8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1im4oj6clh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

We have an urgent request for a handful of our most engaged supporters, _and your name is on our short list, friend. _
Our campaign to flip Florida blue is gaining momentum, but Marco Rubio just raised $6 million, and publications like Roll Call are saying Rubio still has the advantage. **That's why we need to show that the people are in Congresswoman Demings' corner. **
Val Demings can defeat Marco Rubio – a meaningful win for Floridians and our country that can expand our Democratic Senate majority – with grassroots support. So we're counting on 1,000 members of this team – including you, friend – to officially endorse Congresswoman Demings in Florida's Senate race. **Can you please make your official endorsement now?**

In her decades of public service, Congresswoman Demings has never tired of fighting for what's right. She's the champion we need in the Senate – to protect voting rights, to keep health care costs low, to put the needs of Florida's working families first.
But Florida's last Senate race was won by just 10,033 votes, which made it the closest Senate race in the nation. That means every single person who can rally around Congresswoman Demings – every single person who can advance our movement to win in Florida – matters immensely. Your endorsement makes all the difference in a race that could come down to less than a percentage point.
**Our team will be reviewing how many grassroots endorsements come in when we sit down with the congresswoman tomorrow morning, and we hope to share your name with her:[Sign on now to officially endorse Congresswoman Val Demings for Senate, and help our team defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39064588/318250227/742408970?code=jtk1788-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurvey.valdemings.com%2Fdemings-june-priorities-survey1-2021&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTM1ZDIzZi1kMjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLg_JhREUA_5cxqdWKFKKsaVifCIcCTcmUushwcZH3o=&emci=294069b1-d74b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ba35d23f-d24f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20244100)**

name: Ted Cruz
subject: RE: NEW SEAT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
