name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I'm worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
I'm worried, team. New Hampshire is shaping up to be one of the most competitive Senate races of 2022, and news outlets from _The Boston Globe_ to _NBC_ are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection. Just last year, Joe Biden won this state by a single-digit margin -- but New Hampshire Republicans flipped both chambers of the state legislature. **This battleground state has a long history of swinging between parties, and 2022 will be no different.** With our slim 50-50 majority, control of the Senate could come down to this seat. So when I see that our November fundraising has slowed to a crawl, it makes me worried. Republicans are already flooding the Granite State with millions of dollars to unseat me. If we fall short of our goal, it could tip the scales in their favor. **[So I'm humbly asking: can you rush $5 to help defend this critical seat and our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39065022/318252570/-1803038125?refcode=e20211127_mwh-worried&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTE2NjNjNi1kNzRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O0iGWR1KFamuBtVKFfFGRF0SnwTJN5hZPuR4Ik7FaiQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39065026/318252572/-1803038125?refcode=e20211127_mwh-worried&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTE2NjNjNi1kNzRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O0iGWR1KFamuBtVKFfFGRF0SnwTJN5hZPuR4Ik7FaiQ=)
---
[Contribute $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39065028/318252576/-1803038125?refcode=e20211127_mwh-worried&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTE2NjNjNi1kNzRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O0iGWR1KFamuBtVKFfFGRF0SnwTJN5hZPuR4Ik7FaiQ=)

clean_body: | | | I'm worried, team. New Hampshire is shaping up to be one of the most competitive Senate races of 2022, and news outlets from The Boston Globe to NBC are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection. Just last year, Joe Biden won this state by a single-digit margin -- but New Hampshire Republicans flipped both chambers of the state legislature. This battleground state has a long history of swinging between parties, and 2022 will be no different. With our slim 50-50 majority, control of the Senate could come down to this seat. So when I see that our November fundraising has slowed to a crawl, it makes me worried. Republicans are already flooding the Granite State with millions of dollars to unseat me. If we fall short of our goal, it could tip the scales in their favor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = This race will be an uphill battle, but I'm no stranger to tough fights. In 2016, I won my race by only 1,017 votes—that's 0.14 percent. I know that we can hold this seat and protect our vulnerable Senate majority, but it's going to take all of us working together. = Thank you for your support – it means the world! With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Josh Harder
subject: 1 million new affordable housing units
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qzI_3wO6f7OSyfqBkFpe-Poj9yeLBPvyuVA_EIoelTk=/L0BJknIs8aQvkZVhiLG7W6arrwDSv99OzPXrxjbF2So=?refcode=E12599-20211128-AffordableHousing-header-HousingHomelessness-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Peter, Especially over the holidays, we need to be thinking about the nearly 170,000 people in California who don't have a place to sleep or a roof over their heads. **Homelessness is a tragic crisis here in California and we have to fix it.** Over the past year my team and I have been pushing aggressively for a comprehensive plan to combat homelessness. Our plan includes 3 parts: 1\. directing more federal dollars to crisis areas like ours 2. expanding mental and behavioral healthcare and 3. building more affordable housing. _That 's why I'm excited to share with you a big win we just passed through the House in the Build Back Better Act - we're going to be able to build 1 million new affordable housing units across the U.S._ A great example of what we can accomplish is Modesto's 1612 Project, which is an unprecedented effort locally to build affordable housing for low and moderate income folks and become a new hub for local businesses. There's no silver bullet to solving homelessness, but this legislation is a huge step in the right direction. Housing costs are skyrocketing here in California and making sure everyone can afford a roof above their head is a no-brainer. We have a long way to go but wanted to make sure you knew our hard work was paying off! Thanks for reading,
Josh [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/qzI_3wO6f7OSyfqBkFpe-Poj9yeLBPvyuVA_EIoelTk=/L0BJknIs8aQvkZVhiLG7W6arrwDSv99OzPXrxjbF2So=?refcode=E12599-20211128-AffordableHousing-SB-HousingHomelessness-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)

body:
November is a notoriously difficult month for fundraising, and we’re seeing the impact of that right now.
#

Hey team - Travis here, Cheri Beasley’s campaign manager. I wanted to quickly reach out ahead of our campaign’s fundraising deadline on Tuesday to ask you to make a $3 donation.
I’ll explain more about why your support is so important in just a moment, but we’ve got a lot of ground to make up in the next few days. So if you already understand the stakes, please use this link to contribute:
**[https://CheriBeasley.com/November-deadline](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-nov21?refcode=em211127-1-t2&refcode2=65.357359.g_PYxA&t=1&akid=65%2E357359%2Eg_PYxA)**
Look, November is a notoriously difficult month for fundraising, and we’re seeing the impact of that right now.
That’s not great because this is a critical moment for our campaign to be growing. The primary is about three months away, and early voting is going to start shortly after the New Year.
CNN says this is one of the three seats “most likely to flip” to Democrats in 2022, and Cheri’s record of winning statewide and ability to excite and mobilize voters is a big reason this race is on the board.
Cheri can absolutely win this race and beat whichever Republican wins the primary, but only if we work together to build the largest grassroots campaign North Carolina has ever seen. That’s why your support today is so important.
**[We’re sincerely asking you to make a $3 donation to our campaign before our Tuesday deadline. We’re short of our goal, and we need lots of people like you chipping in to make up the difference and make sure we have the resources to win.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-nov21?refcode=em211127-1-t2&refcode2=65.357359.g_PYxA&t=2&akid=65%2E357359%2Eg_PYxA)**

name: Val Demings
subject: Friend, I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
From the bottom of my heart, please believe me when I say that this grassroots movement of ours is working
| | | Friend, I wish I had better news to report: Experts from The Cook Political Report recently revealed that Republicans have a _massive_ advantage in Florida, an advantage that could decide this race. **On top of that, I am falling short of my End of Month fundraising goal just as Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans raised at least $31 million between them.**
---
From the bottom of my heart, please believe me when I say that this grassroots movement of ours is _working_ :__ CNN said Florida's Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip. But making all of that happen comes down to resources – and when I fall short of these goals, my ability to compete falls short as well. **That's why – right here, right now – I must raise another $15,000 before midnight.****

[Please, I wouldn't ask if it weren't so important to me. Can I count on you to rush a contribution of $5 or more right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39065589/318257685/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1789-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTU3OTFkMC1kZTRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQMHOlkH2JrW9LjZlGBdrM1shhDhqU1KVqZAdhKDoLs=)**

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: FWD: Marjorie Taylor Greene wants to award a Congressional Gold Medal to Kyle Rittenhouse...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20211127_mf_goldmedalfwd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20211127_mf_goldmedalfwd][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88906/images/the%20hill%20logo.png]
Marjorie Taylor Greene introduces bill to award Congressional Gold Medal to Rittenhouse
Hey team, I wanted to make sure that you saw yesterday’s message from my team about Marjorie Taylor Greene’s repugnant plan to award Kyle Rittenhouse a Congressional Gold Medal.
This is further proof that we need to do everything in our power to flip this seat. Read the note below, and click here to chip into my campaign to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20211127_mf_goldmedalfwd]
---- Begin forwarded message ----
From: Stop QAnon <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene wants to award a Congressional Gold Medal to Kyle Rittenhouse...
Sent on Friday, November 26, 2021 at 10:00 a.m.
Hey team,

Team, in fewer than 346 days Coloradans will head to the polls. That may seem like a long time but it takes long-term investment, strategy, and grassroots supporters like you to win a race like this. Winning this race isn’t just about keeping Colorado blue or defending our slim Senate majority. It’s about building on the progress we’ve made: keeping 3 million children out of poverty nationwide, cutting taxes for working families, and working to mitigate wildfires and drought so future generations can enjoy our beautiful public lands for decades to come. To expand on that work, I’m counting on support from folks like you. Your investment today will help us reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Mitch McConnell, dark money groups, and self-funding opponents who are distorting my record. clean_body: | = Team, in fewer than 346 days Coloradans will head to the polls. That may seem like a long time but it takes long-term investment, strategy, and grassroots supporters like you to win a race like this. Winning this race isn’t just about keeping Colorado blue or defending our slim Senate majority. It’s about building on the progress we’ve made: keeping 3 million children out of poverty nationwide, cutting taxes for working families, and working to mitigate wildfires and drought so future generations can enjoy our beautiful public lands for decades to come. To expand on that work, I’m counting on support from folks like you. Your investment today will help us reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Mitch McConnell, dark money groups, and self-funding opponents who are distorting my record. We can’t rest for a moment. That’s why I’m humbly asking for your support today before this month's fundraising deadline — because a contribution from you today will have a much greater impact than a gift made next month or right before the election. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thanks for chipping in. Do you remember this?

---
| **" Pelosi Might Steal An Iowa House Seat"**
Wall Street Journal, 3/17/21
---

That's right: earlier this year Nancy Pelosi and her allies tried to use any means possible to win a critical House seat in Iowa.

Dr. Mariannette Miller-Meeks, a strong conservative, actually won the race fair and square, yet that didn't stop Nancy Pelosi from trying to stop the seat from flopping from blue to RED. Now, the Democrats are trying again to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks. We cannot let them succeed.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58887713:6f2kTR2RN:m:1:3299561967:96FB51EE8956E6772F288A36438212E1:r)
---

Dr. Miller-Meeks is a good friend and a strong conservative woman. When Democrats tried to steal her election, she fought back and won! We need her in Congress. That's why I'm proud to have endorsed her and campaigned for her in Iowa.

Will you join me in supporting Mariannette Miller-Meeks and making sure we FIRE Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House?

and help us win back control of the House.")**

All eyes are watching Iowa and this important race, so I hope you will join me in supporting Dr. Miller-Meeks and taking another step toward a RED WAVE.

| [](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=f47c18b532fe46bebbb2592ab2ea2206&_e=2BMczm5L9EmGt6_g140B2hEa7TMRthMJvrmOo_PsEQoKFcJEb0-OQ0R9CmRgv8uNOrFX-F4eO1mqXNRh45qYyJ2GENhbFME91XTTfQufagVmdtIxJha3lQ-tmOyepwareD39wKO1eT83zJD5zzW3rNwiNPZY8jj0WxTE3aHhNsd3GdAoI46tNU-uljOPL8UirFTeh4i-QGKjf4SMpmO9o921D29a_ay4sV6NqhmQ98VbDEHZm6_I0YFEQDiAmvHF_rpf3-G1nsU4UiUO-2kjeY5CZi4zrhSiNYqfzddeSKChbDyX0Vr9VpZL5ZG62p-X-0R4SDbtBmJqqgDdySxqvpBXmgqt4Vj-1wQWGZ74QdF6YUwpRwN9Y-8AtrrVbsDUEVqKDl1j_Zja17rluqPsWC2Eq4TrW_SF6Sc5AB8BuyRgN49f1gHRJZQYYNobvxms-2_F6aGyYrTuq0NdgcS1Zq6Xt6D6Rvl1cJN8tKIGcNo%3D)
---
Hey friends,

Ever since the elections this month I can sense a shift. Something’s in the air -- I feel it!

I just wanted to reach out and say that I haven’t felt this optimistic for the Republican party in a while, and I am relieved that the American people are finally waking up -- and smelling the _RED_ roses.

A RED WAVE is inbound for 2022. The ripples have started -- and we MUST keep up the momentum. A wave can die at any moment, and _**[I’m asking you to help keep it going!](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=f47c18b532fe46bebbb2592ab2ea2206&_e=2BMczm5L9EmGt6_g140B2hEa7TMRthMJvrmOo_PsEQoKFcJEb0-OQ0R9CmRgv8uNOrFX-F4eO1mqXNRh45qYyJ2GENhbFME91XTTfQufagVmdtIxJha3lQ-tmOyepwareD39wKO1eT83zJD5zzW3rNwiNPZY8jj0WxTE3aHhNsd3GdAoI46tNU-uljOPL8UirFTeh4i-QGKjf4SMpmO9o921D29a_ay4sV6NqhmQ98VbDEHZm6_I0YFEQDiAmvHF_rpf3-G1nsU4UiUO-2kjeXG2rCQXykBUhwwPsUfw4SMgIvvs4eGSiL5DjLpSJwfMWfv8sHziz5FTBLgeC9VxWrvtUrAuWnNo_xe0uOOxV36TNMwVjThnJoIIGLFfYBvMoRTuRGfxJffJ4klvCKLB9eXqMBs4nqAy965VD0vRbTQpth11VrjiFZZLgL1QlgCFkC-celFNVuZLGDGsGip6PKYO4N0xpRTCK3xrAWBEJk8%3D)**_

**[Click here to keep up the MOMENTUM!
RED WAVE 2022!](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=f47c18b532fe46bebbb2592ab2ea2206&_e=2BMczm5L9EmGt6_g140B2hEa7TMRthMJvrmOo_PsEQoKFcJEb0-OQ0R9CmRgv8uNOrFX-F4eO1mqXNRh45qYyJ2GENhbFME91XTTfQufagVmdtIxJha3lQ-tmOyepwareD39wKO1eT83zJD5zzW3rNwiNPZY8jj0WxTE3aHhNsd3GdAoI46tNU-uljOPL8UirFTeh4i-QGKjf4SMpmO9o921D29a_ay4sV6NqhmQ98VbDEHZm6_I0YFEQDiAmvHF_rpf3-G1nsU4UiUO-2kjeaX0mjedU92j9SVG1hABDwDKa85p3dHd_ZB1K7XFij-EeXhziOXu4m-yl5GJQBAZU9G_oiJy40U8VA7tA0oU7vgK_hOVuYBWZHZC1zFNu1Ol8AUq3-hggJIj3fCtrBQq86BYPzV2wnM3aWjtYanRLIDKS8uadz0SRElHSeGucxRKtSCi9wayGBN0xkyv7Y8FSf7nTE12OZVapS8S1ZHDef0%3D)**

Keep in touch,

Mike

_Sent from my iPhone._

| Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana

subject: I’m Democrats’ worst nightmare

| | | Fellow Conservative,

You may have seen me in the news this past week, or even on Sean Hannity’s show.

**The reason why I’m suddenly showing up everywhere is simple: [ I was just elected Lieutenant Governor in Virginia — living proof that everything the Democrats try to sell voters on is a lie.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2y7bn-1mp9g-4qqlpo9/ "I was just elected Lieutenant Governor in Virginia — living proof that everything the Democrats try to sell voters on is a lie.")**

_I’m a Jamaican immigrant who legally immigrated to the United States and became a citizen of this country because I wanted the American Dream for myself_ — _**and I did just that.** I’m a small-business owner and a U.S. Marine. _

And now, as the first black woman elected Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, I’m thrilled to start working alongside strong, conservative leaders putting our country FIRST again.

The Left has put American citizens on the back burner for far too long.

**[It’s time that we revive the America First Agenda in our states, and ensure we continue electing more conservative leaders who will help me do just that.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2y7bn-1mp9h-4qqlpo0/ "It’s time that we revive the America First Agenda in our states, and ensure we continue electing more conservative leaders who will help me do just that.")**

Thank you for your support today, Fellow Conservative .

I’m confident that with your help, we’ll continue to chip away at the Left’s control in our country and save our states.

God bless,

Winsome Sears
Lt. Governor-Elect of Virginia

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Did you see Beto's announcement email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

It's been less than two weeks since Beto announced our people-powered
campaign to be the next Governor of Texas, and we're on a roll! In just 13
short days, we've accomplished a lot:

→ Traveled across Texas from El Paso to Corpus Christi to Dallas, visiting
12 counties before Thanksgiving.
→ Met with thousands of folks and listened to their stories about what
they're looking for from their next governor.
→ Grown our movement thanks to the support of tens of thousands of
grassroots donors like you.

Not many
campaigns could do this much in their first two weeks. But we're running a
different kind of campaign. One of, by, and for the people of Texas. But
winning this race will depend heavily on how much support we see in
critical moments — like ahead of our end-of-month deadline coming up in
just three days.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50138?refcode=ema20211127-164434&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=164434%2E444211%2ER9XgmY ]Will you read Beto's email laying out our vision for Texas, and then
please chip in $3 or more to make this vision a reality?

Grateful to be in this with you,

Beto for Texas

----Forwarded message----
Date: November 15, 2021
Sender: Beto O’Rourke
Subject line: I’m running

I am running for governor to serve ALL of the people of Texas.

I believe that the only way we are going to achieve great things for this
state is by looking out for each other and moving forward together.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50138?refcode=ema20211127-164434&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=164434%2E444211%2ER9XgmY ]Donate now to support my campaign »

Whether it was building a successful technology business in my hometown or
working with my fellow El Pasoans on the City Council or passing
legislation in a divided Congress to improve mental healthcare for
veterans, these experiences have taught me that we are most successful
when we keep the focus on people.

When we listen to and learn from each other — regardless of our
differences — we build trust, and that trust allows us to do together what
none of us could do on our own.

The fringe policies and incompetence that we see in Texas today — on
masks, on abortion, on guns, on schools, on the electricity grid — are
symptoms of a larger problem. Our leaders have stopped listening to the
people they were elected to serve. They don’t trust Texans and so they
aren’t able to move forward on what the people of Texas want, like better
jobs and safe communities.

Instead, they’re focused on the agendas of their donors, on positioning
themselves for the next election, on catering to the loudest voices in
their party and on keeping themselves in power regardless of the cost to
the rest of us.

It’s a small vision for such a big state. And it’s hurting the people of
Texas.

We could be leading the world in creating the next generation of energy
jobs instead of praying the electricity grid won’t collapse again this
winter.

We could expand Medicaid and ensure that every one of us is healthy enough
to pursue our education and career instead of leading the nation in the
number of people unable to see a doctor.

We could follow the guidance from our own world-class scientists and
healthcare professionals to protect vulnerable Texans instead of allowing
politics to determine our response to the pandemic. More than 70,000
Texans have died of Covid on this Governor’s watch.

We are losing the big, bold vision that used to define Texas, a Texas big
enough for all of us. Big enough for our dreams and big enough to make
them happen. We’ve been offered something small, mean and uninspiring in
its place.

But it doesn’t have to be this way.

We can do better.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50138?refcode=ema20211127-164434&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=164434%2E444211%2ER9XgmY ]Donate now »

When I ran for Senate in 2018, I traveled to every county of Texas. I met
a lot of people, and had the chance to listen to and learn from them. How
they lived, what they cared about, what kept them up at night, what they
dreamed for their kids and grandkids. It turns out that in most
communities, people have thought through the solutions to the challenges
before them. They don’t need someone to tell them what’s best for them,
they just need someone to listen and then take action.

Something else I picked up, and it’s stayed with me ever since, is that
it’s impossible to write someone off, to take them for granted, to forget
them once you’ve had the chance to meet them and understand where they’re
coming from. I’ve got a strong hunch that if we took the time to listen
more and learn from each other, there’s a whole lot more we could get
done, in our lives, in our communities, and in our state.

I didn’t win that race, or the next one (not even close). But I stayed
with it, kept working to help the people I’d met, the communities I’d been
to. In the face of so much that could cause despair — like the
unprecedented attack on voting rights or the failure of the electricity
grid — I found hope and purpose in the people with whom I volunteered for
the last two years in an organization called Powered by People.

We worked to bring people into our elections and the political process.
Together we helped register more than 250,000 new voters. We organized our
fellow Texans to defend our democracy in the halls of the state capitol
when free and fair elections were under attack. And then we went beyond
the capitol to counties like Rains and Midland, Harris and Dallas, Bowie
and Jefferson, bringing as many people of this state into the conversation
as we could — Republicans and Democrats alike — to listen to each other
and try to find common ground on the right to vote.

And when the lights went out, the heater wouldn’t turn on and the water
stopped running for millions of Texans in February, together we organized
thousands of volunteers to make over a million phone calls to stranded
Texas seniors — connecting them with food, water, warmth and the knowledge
that another human being cared about them and wanted to make sure they
were OK.

Our volunteers raised over a million dollars to help those whose homes had
been damaged in the disaster. Their governor might fail them, but the
people of Texas wouldn’t.

That’s what happens when people are moved to come together to help their
neighbors and fellow Texans. Imagine if we had a governor who felt the
same way.

It’s up to us to make it happen.

And get back to being big again.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50138?refcode=ema20211127-164434&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=164434%2E444211%2ER9XgmY ]I hope you’ll join us and make a donation to become one of our first
grassroots donors. Your support today will make a big difference in the
success of this campaign.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50138?refcode=ema20211127-164434&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=164434%2E444211%2ER9XgmY ]Donate now »

I look forward to working with you for ALL of Texas,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=164434%2E444211%2ER9XgmY

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Congresswoman Val Demings
subject: a tipping point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm running to defeat Marco Rubio and promote real leadership for Florida in the U.S. Senate.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39066170/318280581/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1793-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Nzk1NWU5NC1lZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mH-wce2LtqYKmRV-6yJAtLm9ckPSe3M5vE4773xCVig=)
---
Friend,
I'm running to defeat Marco Rubio and promote real leadership for Florida in the U.S. Senate.

This election is about more than just me, though. We're at a tipping point that will determine the future of our nation. Our core issues – affordable health care, commonsense gun reform, voting rights and more – hinge on winning (or losing) this Florida seat.

I won't mince words: Senate control could come down to my race and what you and I do right now. That's why my team has set an End of Month fundraising goal of $45,000 by midnight tonight.
[**But I just spoke with my finance team, and they told me we haven't met this goal yet: friend, I'm counting on you – will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can to get us across the finish line?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39066171/318280582/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1793-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Nzk1NWU5NC1lZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mH-wce2LtqYKmRV-6yJAtLm9ckPSe3M5vE4773xCVig=)

The GOP will do whatever it takes to tip the scales in their favor – we've already seen from their voter suppression tactics how low they're going in order to cling to power. But we have them worried, friend: Rubio and the Senate Republican campaign arm have already started spreading lies to defeat me, first on cable news and then on social media.

**Florida's last Senate race came down to 0.12 percentage points. Just over 10,000 votes. I don't think this race will be easy – Senate races in Florida never are. But I believe in our people-powered, grassroots movement. **

We know that when voters are able to get to the ballot box, Democrats win. And it's going to take a groundswell of resources to register and mobilize the voters I need to flip Florida blue.

**But I'm falling short of the most consequential fundraising deadline of my campaign so far, just when I need a strong showing. **[**So please, friend, will you contribute $5 or $25 by midnight tonight to make sure I can defeat Marco Rubio and win in Florida?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39066173/318280584/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1793-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Nzk1NWU5NC1lZjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mH-wce2LtqYKmRV-6yJAtLm9ckPSe3M5vE4773xCVig=)

body:
Is everything ok?

Chairman Scott asked me to personally reach out to you because we haven't heard back from you...

We need 10,000 more votes if we're to hold Biden accountable for putting the Chinese ahead of Americans.

Thank you for your help,

Daria
NRSC Digital Director
